title: Re-visiting the Killing of Subathiran Alias Robert by a Tiger Sniper 19 Years ago
body_lines: The  armed struggle launched by Tamil militant groups to achieve the objective of a separate Tamil state caused massive  loss of life and bloodshed. Many of those killed were victims of internecine conflict and fratricidal warfare. Among the many who were killed was Subathiran alias Robert,  a charismatic personality with a colourful history. He was killed  19 years ago in June 2003 while a ceasefire was  supposedly in progress. This column intends re-visiting the murder this week.

Thambirajah Subathiran alias Robert was shot dead on Saturday, June 14, 2003 at about 6. 15 a.m. in Jaffna. Subathiran generally known by his nom de guerre Robert was  at the time of his killing ,  the deputy leader of the Eelam People’s Revolutionary Liberation Front (EPRLF) faction led by Annamalai Varatharajapperumal, former chief minister of the North-Eastern Provincial Council.The  other or main  EPRLF faction  was (and is)  led by  Kandiah Premachandran alias Suresh.

In those days the two groupings were described in the media as Suresh Faction and Varathan Faction respectively. With Perumal living in India  for reasons of security the actual de-facto leaders of the Varathan faction  were  deputy leader  Subathiran and the then  General- Secretary Thirunaavukkarasu Sritharan alias Sugu. In terms of ground reality, it was Robert who provided day to day leadership in the north-east for the party.

Subsequently  the EPRLF   Varathan faction  became known as the Nabha faction after the main EPRLF’s Co-founder -leader K Padmanabha. Nabha also called Ranjan  was assassinated by the Liberation Tigers of Tamil Eelam(LTTE) in June 1990 at Choolaimedhu in Chennai,Tamil Nadu. Later the Nabha faction  was registered as a political party with the candle as its symbol. It was  named the Padmanabha Eelam  Revolutionary Liberation Front. In another change a few years ago the party was re-named Social Democratic Party of Tamils  while retaining the candle symbol.

The Norway brokered Ceasefire had come into effect in February 2002. Despite  the ceasefire being in force,  the LTTE   was indulging in a killing spree, targeting members of the EPRLF Varathan faction and the Eelam Peoples Democratic Party(EPDP) led by Douglas Devananda. The EPRLF  faction headed by Suresh Premachandran had aligned itself with the LTTE by joining the Tamil National Alliance(TNA) and was not targeted by the tigers.

Prior to Robert’s death,  a BBC report had  stated that at least 36 persons  were believed to have  been killed for political reasons in the north-east during 16 months of ceasefire from Feb 2002 to May 2003.. Against this backdrop the killing of Robert – the EPRLF’s north-east commander came as no surprise.

At the time of his death, Robert was staying in the EPRLF party office premises on Hospital Road in Jaffna.The two storeyed building was in the vicinity of Vembadi Girl’s High School. It was daily routine for Robert to exercise every morning on the balcony. He was exercising as usual on that fateful day while two of his comrades stood by watching. Suddenly there were three or four “plops” in succession. A bleeding Subathiran collapsed. He was rushed to the Jaffna Teaching Hospital nearby. Despite the close proximity Robert died before admission. A post-mortem revealed later that bullets piercing his shoulder and chest had hit his lungs, arteries and ribs.

The firing had come from a room in a three-storeyed building in the southern area of Vembadi School. A rifle of the ‘sniper’ variety, presumably fixed with a silencer had been used. The assassin or assassins had fired in a south-eastern direction from a distance of approximately 200 metres. The class room was not in use and was usually kept locked. It was found that a square aperture had been made in the wiremesh covering the window to facilitate ‘sniping.’ A table had been dragged to the window and two small sandbags were mounted on it to  perhaps help place the rifle. The colour of the sand indicated that it had come from Vembadi school grounds.

There were tell-tale signs  of the assassins keeping vigil overnight to target Robert in the morning. An empty Coca Cola bottle, half empty water bottle, a half empty mixture packet , a nearly empty Lemon Puff biscuit packet and some chocolate labels were left behind. These suggested that the assassins had been hiding in the room from the previous evening or night.

It was patently clear that the assassins were skilled marksmen as it was only Robert whom they had taken out despite two others being on the balcony. The gun was obviously powerful and sophisticated and would have had telescopic sights necessary for sniping. Taking aim and firing precisely from a particular angle at a distance of around 200 metres was certainly not the handiwork of amateurs.

The testimony of the school’s two watchmen was interesting . According to them they had not known anything till two persons came down in the  morning and gave them the “key” to the locked room used for the killing. They were carrying a large bag and had no visible firearms on their person. One was a male in trousers and the other a female in school uniform. If these assertions were correct then the gun must have been dismantled and put in the large bag. But how did they get the key to the locked classroom? was the question.

Police  suspected  complicity or at least knowledge of the killing by the watchers. On the previous  evening the EPRLF  had received a report that the Nallur area Tiger Political Commissar Eswaran was seen at Vembadi school. When the EPRLF men questioned the watchers that evening they had flatly denied it. The watchers Manickam Ilankumaran and Muttukumaru Chandranathan  were  taken into custody by the Police  and remanded until further notice for questioning.  Later they were  released on bail.

Shortly after  Subathiran was killed, a rumour began circulating in Jaffna that the EPRLF leader was killed  because of an “Indian connection.” It had been  reported in the Tamil  media that a helicopter carrying some Indian officials had landed at the Jaffna Central College grounds recently. Speculation was rife that the officials concerned were  Indian espionage agency RAW (research and analysis wing) operatives. The Jaffna grapevine  began humming that those officials had  had a 45 minute meeting with Subathiran. The Tigers apparently were upset by this and in a pre-emptive bid had killed Subathiran.

If Indian intelligence personnel had indeed been in touch with Subathiran , it was highly unlikely that they would have done  so  in such an  open and brazen manner.  Cloak and dagger activity is not done so visibly. Only morons would have dared to conduct such a meeting in Jaffna with a Tiger omnipresence. Neither RAW nor Subathiran could be called imbeciles. Besides if a face to face meeting was necessary, Robert could have discreetly visited Colombo.

However implausible, this suspicion  may  very well have been the immediate cause for the LTTE in targeting Robert. With Robert being the mainstay of the EPRLF, the LTTE would have certainly wanted him out of the way. The Tigers knew that the easiest way to wreck an organisation is to eliminate key figures. The mode of assassination however suggested a sense of urgent priority and in that case Robert’s murder may have been expedited due to this reason.

Though the  finger of guilt poined  to the LTTE , the tigers in typical fashion neither denied nor condemned the Robert  assassination or the other killings. Given the  on going  pattern of political killings in the Tamil areas  during the ceasefire, there were strong grounds to believe that the LTTE was responsible for all the killings including the  Robert  murder . The LTTE however depicted  all the killings as law and order problems for which the police should take responsibility. Since these incidents took place in government controlled areas the onus was on the state , argued the LTTE.  The then LTTE  Political Wing Chief S. P. Tamilselvan  evaded a direct answer when the Norwegian facilitators and monitors broached the subject..

In spite of the wall of silence that  prevailed  in the north-east then,  the Tamil people were well aware of who was responsible for what. They knew fully well that these types of killings began after Tiger cadres were allowed unfettered entry into government controlled areas to do political work in terms of the ceasefire. This was preceded by the handing over of arms in the possession of Tamil militant groups as stipulated by the ceasefire. Given the fact  that most of the political activists killed were connected to political organisations opposed to the Tigers and that the LTTE had wanted  these Tamil political rivals to leave the Tamil areas, it did  not require much intelligence to realise what was happening.

Despite the denials, the Tigers often gave the game away through  callous  arrogance. The LTTE never issued a statement expressing sympathy or condolences when such persons were killed even as a subterfuge to disclaim responsibility. The deafening silence maintained by the LTTE when such murders took  place was an indirect indictment of the Tigers.

Even though the disappearances and killings of Tamil political dissidents in the north-east were going on during the ceasefire, there was  very little response to the phenomenon from both official circles as well as the human rights cum peace activist lobby. This was presumably due to a reluctance to ‘upset’ the LTTE in any way. It was felt perhaps that reprimanding the Tigers could lead to a disruption of the so called ‘peace process.’

The killing of Subathiran however  shattered this complacency.Subathiran was  the de-jure No. 2 and de-facto No. 1 of the EPRLF (V) organisation when killed. He was a political leader in his own right. Thus, the political establishment and media organs  were  forced to take notice of the killing.

Large crowds paid their respects as Subathiran’s body  was laid  in the Jayaratne Funeral Parlour at Borella. Many politicians and journalists were present at the funeral. The  then Indian Deputy High Commissioner too was an attendee. Subathiran’s mother and sister flew down to Sri Lanka from Canada for the funeral. The cremation was on Thursday, June 19 at the Hindu section of Borella Kanatte cemetery.

Earlier his body lay in state at the Eelam People’s Revolutionary Liberation Front (EPRLF) office at Hospital Road in Jaffna. The EPRLF office as well as the EPDP office at Stanley Road blared mournful music over loudspeakers. Various statements expressing condolences and condemnation over the killing were issued.

Thambirajah Subathiran  alias Robert was  born on December 24, 1957. He was educated at Jaffna Central and Manipay Hindu Colleges. His father Thambapillai Thambirajah was a retired police sub-inspector hailing from Nunavil East in Chavakachcheri.  His mother  Ratnamma ,born in Udupiddy, was the sister of former ASP Kuttipillai Kumar.

Subathiran’s maternal uncle, ASP Kumar was one of the early victims of Tamil armed militancy.The retired police officer had crossed the path of the Tamil Eelam Liberation Organisation (TELO) led by the legendary Thangathurai alias Thanganna. The TELO was determined to kill Kumar who always carried a gun for his protection. It was known however that Kumar being a devout Hindu did not carry a gun on Fridays. He was buying plantains at the market for his grand daughter on a Friday when Jegan of the TELO closed in on him. Kumar’s hand went instinctively into his pocket reaching for a gun that was not there. Kumar’s hand came out with a handkerchief that fluttered briefly as Jegan gunned him down.

Subathiran’s family was affected in both the 1977 and 1983  anti-Tamil violence. In  August 1977 Thambirajah was on duty elsewhere when his house in Kalutara was attacked by mobs. Ratnammah escaped by hiding in a Muslim neighbour’s house. All their belongings were burnt. Ratnamma relocated to Jaffna but Thambirajah continued to serve in the south. In  July 1983 he was assaulted by mobs in Kirulapone with some fellow Sinhala policemen collaborating. After discharge from hospital the disgusted policeman retired from the force and went home to Jaffna.

Their troubles did not end. The  Peoples Liberation Organization of Tamil Eelam(PLOTE) took over their house in Udupiddy given as dowry. So they moved to Thambirajah’s house in Nunavil. The LTTE later took over the Udupiddy house and made it a  tiger camp. In 1987 during the Vadamarachchy operation led by Denzil Kobbekaduwa the Udupiddy house – being an LTTE base was destroyed.

It was amid these circumstances that Subathiran acquired militant tendencies as a student. He joined the General Union of Eelam Students (GUES) that went on to form the nucleus of the EPRLF. He had a charismatic personality and was able to recruit a large number of youngsters to the movement. Though the EPRLF was conducting a well planned political programme , the 1983 violence and consequent Indian involvement compelled that movement to embark upon a militarisation process.

Subathiran took the  nom de guerre  Robert and underwent military training at the EPRLF camp in Kumbakonam in Tamil Nadu. He did not receive direct Indian training in Uttar Pradesh. Robert h soon became the EPRLF commander for Jaffna while Douglas Devananda was overall chief of the People’s Liberation Army – the military wing of the EPRLF.

Robert and Ramesh were responsible for the EPRLF’s successful heist of the Jaffna post office amounting to around Rs. 11 lakhs. He was also involved in the Chankanai bank robbery. Robert also led the attack on the Kilinochchi police station and participated in the abortive attack on Karainagar naval base led by Sinnavan under the direction of Douglas.

In 1985 Robert was travelling on a motor cycle with another cadre named  Kumar, along Beach Road in Gurunagar by the army cantonment when soldiers recognised Kumar. They fired and killed Kumar while Robert was captured. His importance however was not realised and Subathiran spent more than two years in detention at Gurunagar, Palaly, Elephant Pass and Boosa. He, along with his close friend Sritharan alias Sugu were released after the Indo-Lanka Accord.

Robert followed the EPRLF line faithfully during the  Indian Army (IPKF) period and at one point was nominated as a provincial councillor. His father Thambirajah worked as security supervisor under the provincial council. An LTTE plot to kill some important EPRLF provincial councillors was foiled by Thambirajah. This led to him being marked by the Tigers. Robert’s father Thambirajah was seized by the LTTE on November 11, 1989. Eyewitnesses saw him struggling and kicking his captors and the vehicle.

The LTTE informed Robert’s mother that her husband was being interrogated. In May 1990 Thambirajah’s mother died. His wife entreated the LTTE to release him so that he could perform the last rites according to custom. The Tigers then told her that her husband had tried to escape from custody by wresting a gun from his guards and had been killed in the fracas. He was cremated on November 17, 1989 at Madduvil, the Tigers said.

Robert meanwhile fled Sri Lanka with other EPRLF cadres after the IPKF withdrew. He went to  Odisha (then Orissa ) and was  in charge  of a refugee camp there. His mother Ratnammah having lost her husband and being parted from her son became an openly defiant critic of the LTTE. The Tigers in 1992 took her by force on a boat to India and left her there. It was an ‘expulsion’ form of punishment. She was reunited with her son in Madras and later returned to Colombo from where she went to Canada to  join her daughter.

Robert returned in the mid ’90s to Sri Lanka. After the armed forces recaptured Jaffna, he returned to Jaffna and commenced political work. The atrocities of certain EPRLF sections  like the notorious “Mandaiyan Kuzhu”had alienated the movement from the people. It was due to the untiring efforts of  persons like Robert who apologised publicly for past excesses , that the EPRLF  was able to re-establish  itself in Jaffna again. The 1998 local authority polls saw the party win seats on several councils. It got 15% of the total vote. Robert was elected Jaffna municipal councillor.

The EPRLF split after the return of Varatharaja Perumal to Sri Lanka from India. Robert joined the Varathan faction and became its deputy leader. He was virtually its head as Perumal spent most of his time in India. Robert was also a tower of strength to the Jaffna municipal council and supported the TULF administration in the face of LTTE threats.

Despite  danger, he refused to  relocate  to Colombo and remained in Jaffna, rallying EPRLF cadres. Maintaining cordial relations with moderate politicians of all hues, Robert strove manfully to keep the EPRLF afloat amid turbulent political waters. He never lost sight of the original goal of Tamil emancipation but moderated it now to the vision of regional autonomy along with democracy, pluralism and enforcement of human rights. Though having bade a firm farewell to arms and the Eelam dream, Robert continued to remain what he was essentially – a mighty fighter for the rights of Tamils – until the very end.
This article was published in the “D.B.S.Jeyaraj Column” of the “Daily Mirror”on June 11th  2022. It can be accessed here:

si.title: වසර 19 කට පෙර කොටි ස්නයිපර් වෙඩික්කරුවෙකු විසින් සුබතිරන් හෙවත් රොබට් ඝාතනය කිරීම නැවත බැලීම
body_lines: වෙනම දෙමළ රාජ්‍යයක අරමුණ සාක්ෂාත් කර ගැනීම සඳහා දෙමළ සටන්කාමී කණ්ඩායම් දියත් කළ සන්නද්ධ අරගලය හේතුවෙන් විශාල ජීවිත හානි සහ ලේ වැගිරීම් සිදු විය. මියගිය අයගෙන් බොහෝ දෙනෙක් අභ්‍යන්තර ගැටුම් සහ සහෝදර ඝාතන යුද්ධයට ගොදුරු වූවෝ වෙති. ඝාතනයට ලක් වූ බොහෝ දෙනා අතර වර්ණවත් ඉතිහාසයක් ඇති චරිතාංග පෞරුෂයක් ඇති සුබතිරන් හෙවත් රොබට් ද විය. ඔහු මීට වසර 19 කට පෙර 2003 ජුනි මාසයේදී සටන් විරාමයක් ක්‍රියාත්මක වෙමින් තිබියදී මිය ගියේය. මෙම තීරුව මේ සතියේ මිනීමැරුම නැවත බැලීමට අදහස් කරයි.

තම්බිරාජා සුබතිරන් හෙවත් රොබට් 2003 ජුනි 14 සෙනසුරාදා උදෑසන 6. 15 ට පමණ යාපනයේදී වෙඩි තබා ඝාතනය කරන ලදී. සුබතිරන් සාමාන්‍යයෙන් හඳුන්වනු ලබන්නේ රොබට් යන ඔහුගේ නාමයෙනි ප්‍රධාන EPRLF කල්ලිය මෙහෙයවනු ලැබුවේ කන්දයියා ප්‍රේමචන්ද්‍රන් හෙවත් සුරේෂ් විසිනි.

එදා මේ කණ්ඩායම් දෙක මාධ්‍යවල විස්තර කළේ පිළිවෙළින් සුරේෂ් පාර්ශවය සහ වරතන් පාර්ශවය ලෙසයි. පෙරුමාල් ආරක්ෂක හේතූන් මත ඉන්දියාවේ ජීවත් වීමත් සමඟ වරතන් පාර්ශවයේ සැබෑ නායකයින් වූයේ නියෝජ්‍ය නායක සුභතිරන් සහ එවකට මහලේකම් තිරුනාවුක්කරසු ශ්‍රීදරන් හෙවත් සුගු ය. ග්‍රවුන්ඩ් රියැලිටි අනුව බලන විට පක්ෂයට උතුරු-නැගෙනහිර ප්‍රදේශයේ එදිනෙදා නායකත්වය ලබා දුන්නේ රොබට් ය.

පසුව ඊපීආර්එල්එෆ් ප්‍රධාන සම නිර්මාතෘ කේ පද්මනාභගෙන් පසුව ඊපීආර්එල්එෆ් වරතන් පාර්ශ්වය නාභ පාර්ශවය ලෙස ප්‍රකට විය. 1990 ජුනි මාසයේදී තමිල්නාඩුවේ චෙන්නායි හි චූලයිමෙඩුහිදී දෙමළ ඊළාම් විමුක්ති කොටි (එල්ටීටීඊ) විසින් රංජන් ලෙස හඳුන්වන නාභා ඝාතනය කරන ලදී. පසුව නාභ පාර්ශවය දේශපාලන පක්ෂයක් ලෙස ලියාපදිංචි කර ඇත්තේ ඉටිපන්දම ලකුණින්. එය පද්මනාභ ඊළාම් විප්ලවවාදී විමුක්ති පෙරමුණ ලෙස නම් කරන ලදී. මීට වසර කිහිපයකට පෙර තවත් වෙනසකින් එම පක්ෂය ඉටිපන්දම් ලකුණ තබා ගනිමින් දෙමළ ජනතාවගේ සමාජ ප්‍රජාතන්ත්‍රවාදී පක්ෂය ලෙස නැවත නම් කරන ලදී.

2002 පෙබරවාරි මාසයේදී නෝර්වේ තැරැව්කාර සටන් විරාමය ක්‍රියාත්මක විය. සටන් විරාමය ක්‍රියාත්මකව තිබියදීත්, එල්ටීටීඊය ඊපීආර්එල්එෆ් වරතන් පාර්ශවයේ සහ ඩග්ලස් දේවානන්දගේ නායකත්වයෙන් යුත් ඊළාම් ජනතා ප්‍රජාතන්ත්‍රවාදී පක්ෂයේ (ඊපීඩීපී) සාමාජිකයින් ඉලක්ක කර ගනිමින් ඝාතන රැල්ලක යෙදෙමින් සිටියේය. සුරේෂ් ප්‍රේමචන්ද්‍රන්ගේ නායකත්වයෙන් යුත් ඊපීආර්එල්එෆ් කණ්ඩායම දෙමළ ජාතික සන්ධානයට (ටීඑන්ඒ) එක්වීමෙන් එල්ටීටීඊය සමඟ පෙළ ගැසී සිටි අතර කොටින්ගේ ඉලක්කයක් නොවීය.

රොබට්ගේ මරණයට පෙර බීබීසී වාර්තාවක් ප්‍රකාශ කර තිබුණේ 2002 පෙබරවාරි සිට 2003 මැයි දක්වා සටන් විරාමයේ මාස 16ක කාලසීමාව තුළ ඊසාන දිග ප්‍රදේශයේ දේශපාලන හේතූන් මත අවම වශයෙන් පුද්ගලයන් 36 දෙනෙකු ඝාතනය කර ඇති බවට විශ්වාස කරන බවයි.. මේ පසුබිම තුළ රොබට් ඝාතනය – ඊපීආර්එල්එෆ් හි උතුරු-නැගෙනහිර ආඥාපතිවරයා පුදුමයට පත් නොවීය.

මියයන විට රොබට් නැවතී සිටියේ යාපනයේ රෝහල් පාරේ පිහිටි ඊපීආර්එල්එෆ් පක්ෂ කාර්යාල පරිශ්‍රයේය. දෙමහල් ගොඩනැගිල්ල තිබුණේ වෙම්බඩි උසස් බාලිකා විද්‍යාලය අවටය. රොබට් සෑම උදෑසනකම බැල්කනියේ ව්‍යායාම කිරීම දෛනික චර්යාව විය. එම දෛවෝපගත දිනයේ ඔහු සුපුරුදු පරිදි ව්‍යායාම කරමින් සිටි අතර ඔහුගේ සගයන් දෙදෙනෙක් ඒ දෙස බලා සිටියහ. එකපාරටම "ප්ලොප්" තුනක් හෝ හතරක් අනුප්රාප්තිකය. ලේ ගලමින් සුභතිරන් ඇද වැටුණි. ඔහු වහා ම අසල පිහිටි යාපනය ශික්ෂණ රෝහලට ඇතුළත් කර ඇත. සමීපත්වය තිබියදීත්, රොබට් ඇතුළත් වීමට පෙර මිය ගියේය. පශ්චාත් මරණ පරීක්ෂණයෙන් පසුව හෙළි වූයේ ඔහුගේ උරහිස සහ පපුව පසාරු කරගෙන ගිය වෙඩි උණ්ඩ ඔහුගේ පෙනහළු, ධමනි සහ ඉළ ඇටවල වැදී ඇති බවයි.

වෙඩි ප්‍රහාරය එල්ල වී ඇත්තේ වෙම්බඩි පාසලේ දකුණු ප්‍රදේශයේ තෙමහල් ගොඩනැගිල්ලක කාමරයක සිටයි. ‘ස්නයිපර්’ වර්ගයේ රයිෆලයක්, සයිලන්සරයකින් සවි කර ඇතැයි අනුමාන කළ හැකිය. ඝාතකයා හෝ ඝාතකයින් ගිනිකොන දෙසින් ආසන්න වශයෙන් මීටර් 200 ක් පමණ දුරින් වෙඩි තබා ඇත. පන්ති කාමරය භාවිතයේ නොතිබූ අතර සාමාන්‍යයෙන් අගුලු දමා තිබුණි. ‘ස්නයිප්’ කිරීමට පහසුකම් සැලසීම සඳහා ජනේලය ආවරණය කරන ලද කම්බිවල හතරැස් විවරයක් සාදා ඇති බව සොයා ගන්නා ලදී. මේසයක් ජනේලය වෙත ඇදගෙන ගොස් රයිෆලය තැබීමට උපකාර කිරීම සඳහා කුඩා වැලි කොට්ට දෙකක් සවි කර ඇත. වැලි පාටින් හැඟවූයේ එය පැමිණ ඇත්තේ වෙම්බඩි පාසල් පිටියෙන් බවයි.

උදෑසන රොබට් ඉලක්ක කර ගැනීම සඳහා ඝාතකයින් එක රැයකින් සෝදිසියෙන් සිටි බවට කතන්දර සලකුණු තිබුණි. හිස් කොකා කෝලා බෝතලයක්, හිස් වතුර බෝතලයක්, අඩක් හිස් මිශ්‍රණ පැකට්ටුවක්, හිස් ලෙමන් පෆ් බිස්කට් පැකට්ටුවක් සහ චොකලට් ලේබල් කිහිපයක් ඉතිරි විය. මෙයින් ඇඟවෙන්නේ ඝාතකයන් පෙරේදා සවස හෝ රාත්‍රියේ සිට කාමරයේ සැඟවී සිටි බවයි.

තවත් දෙදෙනෙකු බැල්කනියේ සිටියද ඔවුන් පිටතට ගත්තේ රොබට් පමණක් බැවින් ඝාතකයින් දක්ෂ වෙඩික්කරුවන් බව පැහැදිලිවම පැහැදිලි විය. තුවක්කුව පැහැදිලිවම බලවත් හා නවීන වූ අතර ස්නයිප් කිරීම සඳහා අවශ්‍ය දුරේක්ෂ දර්ශන තිබිය යුතුය. මීටර් 200 ක් පමණ දුරින් නිශ්චිත කෝණයකින් ඉලක්ක කර වෙඩි තැබීම නිසැකවම ආධුනිකයන්ගේ අත්වැඩ නොවේ.

පාසලේ මුරකරුවන් දෙදෙනාගේ සාක්ෂිය සිත්ගන්නා සුළු විය. ඔවුන් පවසන පරිදි උදෑසන පුද්ගලයන් දෙදෙනෙකු පැමිණ ඝාතනය සඳහා යොදාගත් අගුලු දැමූ කාමරයේ “යතුර” ලබාදෙන තුරු ඔවුන් කිසිවක් දැන සිටියේ නැත. ඔවුන් විශාල බෑගයක් අතැතිව සිටි අතර ඔවුන්ගේ පුද්ගලයාගේ අතේ පෙනෙන ගිනි අවි තිබුණේ නැත. එක් අයෙක් කලිසමකින් සැරසී සිටි පිරිමි අයෙක් වන අතර අනෙකා පාසල් නිල ඇඳුමින් සැරසී සිටි කාන්තාවක්. මෙම ප්‍රකාශයන් නිවැරදි නම් තුවක්කුව ගලවා විශාල බෑගයට දැමිය යුතුය. නමුත් අගුලු දමා තිබූ පන්ති කාමරයේ යතුර ඔවුන්ට ලැබුණේ කෙසේද? යන ප්‍රශ්නය විය.

මුරකරුවන් විසින් ඝාතනයට සම්බන්ධ හෝ අවම වශයෙන් දැනුමක් හෝ ඇතැයි පොලිසිය සැක කරයි. පෙරේදා සවස නල්ලූර් ප්‍රදේශයේ කොටි දේශපාලන කොමසාරිස් ඊස්වරන් වෙම්බඩි පාසලේ සිටිනු දුටු බවට ඊපීආර්එල්එෆ් වෙත වාර්තාවක් ලැබී තිබිණි. ඊපීආර්එල්එෆ් සාමාජිකයින් එදින සවස මුරකරුවන්ගෙන් ප්‍රශ්න කළ විට ඔවුන් එය එකහෙළා ප්‍රතික්ෂේප කර ඇත. මුරකරුවන් වන මානික්කම් ඉලංකුමාරන් සහ මුත්තුකුමරු චන්ද්‍රනාදන් පොලිස් භාරයට ගෙන ප්‍රශ්න කිරීම සඳහා නැවත දැනුම් දෙන තුරු රක්ෂිත බන්ධනාගාර ගත කර තිබේ. පසුව ඔවුන් ඇප මත මුදා හැරුණා.

සුබතිරන් ඝාතනය වී ටික කලකට පසු ඊපීආර්එල්එෆ් නායකයා මරා දැමුවේ “ඉන්දියානු සම්බන්ධයක්” නිසා බවට යාපනයේ කටකතාවක් පැතිරෙන්නට විය. ඉන්දීය නිලධාරීන් කිහිප දෙනෙකු රැගත් හෙලිකොප්ටරයක් ​​පසුගියදා යාපනය මධ්‍ය මහා විද්‍යාලයීය ක්‍රීඩාංගණයට ගොඩබැස්වූ බවට දෙමළ මාධ්‍යවල පළවී තිබුණා. අදාළ නිලධාරීන් ඉන්දීය ඔත්තු බැලීමේ ආයතනය වන RAW (පර්යේෂණ සහ විශ්ලේෂණ අංශය) ක්‍රියාකාරීන් බවට සමපේක්ෂනය පැතිර ගියේය. එම නිලධාරීන් සුබතිරන් සමඟ විනාඩි 45ක සාකච්ඡාවක් පැවැත්වූ බව යාපනයේ මිදි වැල මුමුණන්නට විය. කොටි ත්‍රස්තවාදීන් මෙයින් කලබල වී ඇති අතර පූර්ව සූදානමකින් සුබතිරන් මරා දමා ඇත.

ඉන්දීය බුද්ධි අංශ නිලධාරීන් සුබතිරන් සමඟ සම්බන්ධ වී සිටියේ නම්, ඔවුන් මෙතරම් විවෘත හා නිර්ලජ්ජිත ලෙස එසේ කරනු ඇතැයි සිතිය නොහැක. සළුව සහ කිනිතුල්ල ක්‍රියාකාරකම් එතරම් දෘශ්‍යමාන ලෙස සිදු නොවේ. කොටි සර්වබලධාරී ලෙස යාපනයේ එවැනි රැස්වීමක් පැවැත්වීමට නිර්භීත වූයේ මෝඩයන් පමණි. රෝ හෝ සුබතිරන් යන දෙදෙනාම අශිෂ්ටයන් ලෙස හැඳින්විය නොහැක. ඊට අමතරව මුහුණට මුහුණ හමුවීමක් අවශ්‍ය නම්, රොබට්ට ඥානාන්විතව කොළඹට පැමිණීමට තිබුණි.

කෙසේ පිළිගත නොහැකි වුවත්, රොබට් ඉලක්ක කර ගැනීමට කොටි සංවිධානයට ආසන්නතම හේතුව මෙම සැකය විය හැකිය. රොබට් ඊපීආර්එල්එෆ් සංවිධානයේ ප්‍රධානියා වීම නිසා එල්ටීටීඊයට ඔහුව මාර්ගයෙන් ඉවත් කිරීමට අවශ්‍ය වන්නට ඇත. සංවිධානයක් විනාශ කිරීමට ඇති පහසුම ක්‍රමය ප්‍රධාන චරිත නැති කිරීම බව කොටි දැන සිටියහ. කෙසේ වෙතත්, ඝාතන මාදිලිය හදිසි ප්‍රමුඛතාවයක් පිළිබඳ හැඟීමක් යෝජනා කළ අතර එම අවස්ථාවේ දී රොබට්ගේ ඝාතනය මේ හේතුව නිසා වේගවත් වන්නට ඇත.

එල්ටීටීඊය වෙත වරදේ ඇඟිල්ල දිගු වුවද, සාමාන්‍ය ආකාරයෙන් කොටි රොබට් ඝාතනය හෝ වෙනත් ඝාතන ප්‍රතික්ෂේප කළේ හෝ හෙළා දැක නැත. සටන් විරාම කාලය තුළ දෙමළ ප්‍රදේශවල සිදුවෙමින් පවතින දේශපාලන ඝාතන රටාව අනුව, රොබට් ඝාතනය ඇතුළු සියලු ඝාතනවලට කොටි සංවිධානය වගකිව යුතු බවට විශ්වාස කිරීමට ප්‍රබල හේතු තිබුණි. එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ.ය කෙසේ වෙතත් මෙම ඝාතන සියල්ල පොලිසිය විසින් වගකීම භාරගත යුතු නීතිය හා සාමය පිළිබඳ ගැටලු ලෙස නිරූපණය කළේය. මෙම සිදුවීම් සිදුවූයේ රජයේ පාලන ප්‍රදේශවල බැවින් එහි වගකීම රජයට පැවරී ඇති බව එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ.ය තර්ක කළේය. නෝර්වීජියානු පහසුකම් සපයන්නන් සහ අධීක්ෂකවරුන් මෙම විෂය පිළිබඳව කරුණු ඉදිරිපත් කළ විට එවකට එල්ටීටීඊ දේශපාලන අංශයේ ප්‍රධානී එස් පී තමිල්සෙල්වන් සෘජු පිළිතුරක් මග හැරියේය.

එදා උතුරු නැඟෙනහිර පැවති නිහඩ බැම්ම නොතකා, ඊට වගකිව යුත්තේ කවුරුන්ද යන්න දෙමළ ජනතාව හොඳින් දැන සිටියහ. මෙවැනි ඝාතන ආරම්භ වූයේ සටන් විරාමයට අනුව දේශපාලන කටයුතු කිරීමට රජයේ පාලන ප්‍රදේශවලට අසීමිත ලෙස ඇතුළුවීමට කොටි සාමාජිකයන්ට අවසර දීමෙන් පසුව බව ඔවුන් හොඳින්ම දැන සිටියහ. සටන් විරාමය මගින් නියම කර ඇති පරිදි දෙමළ සටන්කාමී කණ්ඩායම් සන්තකයේ තිබූ අවි ආයුධ භාරදීම මෙයට පෙර සිදු විය. ඝාතනයට ලක් වූ දේශපාලන ක්‍රියාකාරීන්ගෙන් බහුතරයක් කොටින්ට විරුද්ධ දේශපාලන සංවිධානවලට සම්බන්ධ අය වීමත්, මෙම දෙමළ දේශපාලන ප්‍රතිවාදීන් දෙමළ ප්‍රදේශවලින් ඉවත් වීම එල්ටීටීඊයට අවශ්‍ය වූ නිසාත්, සිදුවන්නේ කුමක්ද යන්න වටහා ගැනීමට එතරම් බුද්ධියක් අවශ්‍ය නොවීය.

ප්‍රතික්ෂේප කිරීම් නොතකා, කොටි බොහෝ විට ගේම දුන්නේ නිර්දය අහංකාරයෙනි. වගකීම පැහැර හැරීමේ උප්පරවැට්ටියක් ලෙස පවා එවැනි පුද්ගලයන් ඝාතනය වූ විට එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ.ය කිසිවිටකත් සංවේගය හෝ ශෝකය ප්‍රකාශ කර ප්‍රකාශයක් නිකුත් කළේ නැත. මෙවැනි ඝාතන සිදුවෙද්දී එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ.ය කන් බිහිරි කරවන නිහඬතාවය කොටින්ට වක්‍ර චෝදනාවක් විය.

සටන් විරාම කාලය තුළ උතුරු-නැගෙනහිර දෙමළ දේශපාලන විරුද්ධවාදීන් අතුරුදහන් කිරීම් සහ ඝාතනය කිරීම් සිදු වුවද, මෙම සංසිද්ධියට නිල කව දෙකෙන් මෙන්ම මානව හිමිකම් සහ සාම ක්‍රියාකාරී ලොබියෙන් ද ලැබුණේ ඉතා අඩු ප්‍රතිචාරයකි. මෙය එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ.ය කුමන හෝ ආකාරයකින් ‘කලබල කිරීමට’ ඇති අකමැත්ත නිසා විය හැකිය. කොටින්ට තරවටු කිරීම ඊනියා ‘සාම ක්‍රියාවලිය’ කඩාකප්පල් කිරීමට හේතු විය හැකි බව හැඟී ගියේය.

කෙසේ වෙතත් සුබතිරන් ඝාතනය මෙම උදාසීනත්වය බිඳ දැමීය. ඝාතනය කරන විට සුබතිරන් ඊපීආර්එල්එෆ් (වී) සංවිධානයේ අංක 2 ජූරිවරයා සහ සත්‍ය අංක 1 විය. ඔහු තමාගේම අයිතියෙන් දේශපාලන නායකයෙක් විය. මේ අනුව, දේශපාලන සංස්ථාපිතයට සහ මාධ්‍ය ආයතනවලට මෙම ඝාතනය ගැන අවධානය යොමු කිරීමට සිදු විය.

සුබතිරන්ගේ දේහය බොරැල්ල ජයරත්න මල් ශාලාවේ තැන්පත් කර ඇති අවස්ථාවේදී විශාල පිරිසක් ගෞරව දැක්වූහ. අවමංගල්‍ය උත්සවයට දේශපාලනඥයින් සහ මාධ්‍යවේදීන් රැසක් එක්ව සිටියා. එවකට ඉන්දීය නියෝජ්‍ය මහ කොමසාරිස්වරයාද පැමිණ සිටියේය. සුභතිරන්ගේ මව සහ සහෝදරිය අවමංගල්‍ය කටයුතු සඳහා කැනඩාවේ සිට ශ්‍රී ලංකාවට පැමිණ ඇත. ආදාහනය ජුනි 19 බ්‍රහස්පතින්දා බොරැල්ල කනත්ත සුසාන භූමියේ හින්දු අංශයේදී සිදු කරන ලදී.

මීට පෙර ඔහුගේ දේහය යාපනයේ රෝහල් පාරේ පිහිටි ඊළාම් ජනතා විප්ලවවාදී විමුක්ති පෙරමුණේ (ඊපීආර්එල්එෆ්) කාර්යාලයේ තැන්පත් කර තිබුණි. ඊපීආර්එල්එෆ් කාර්යාලය මෙන්ම ස්ටැන්ලි පාරේ පිහිටි ඊපීඩීපී කාර්යාලය ද ශබ්ද විකාශන යන්ත්‍රවලින් ශෝකජනක සංගීතය හඬ නඟා ඇත. ඝාතනය සම්බන්ධයෙන් ශෝකය සහ හෙළා දකිමින් විවිධ ප්‍රකාශ නිකුත් විය.

තම්බිරාජා සුබතිරන් හෙවත් රොබට් උපත ලැබුවේ 1957 දෙසැම්බර් 24 වැනිදාය.ඔහු යාපනය මධ්‍යම හා මනිපායි හින්දු විද්‍යාලවලින් අධ්‍යාපනය ලැබීය. ඔහුගේ පියා චාවකච්චේරියේ නුනාවිල් නැගෙනහිර ප්‍රදේශයේ පදිංචිව සිටි විශ්‍රාමික උප පොලිස් පරීක්ෂකවරයෙකි. උඩුපිඩ්ඩි ප්‍රදේශයේ උපන් ඔහුගේ මව රත්නම්මා හිටපු සහකාර පොලිස් අධිකාරී කුට්ටිපිල්ලේ කුමාර්ගේ සොහොයුරියයි.

සුභතිරන්ගේ මාමා, සහකාර පොලිස් අධිකාරී කුමාර් දෙමළ සන්නද්ධ සටන්කාමීත්වයේ මුල් වින්දිතයන්ගෙන් කෙනෙකි. විශ්‍රාමික පොලිස් නිලධාරියා ජනප්‍රිය තංගතුරෙයි හෙවත් තංගන්නාගේ නායකත්වයෙන් යුත් දෙමළ ඊළාම් විමුක්ති සංවිධානයේ (TELO) මාවත තරණය කර ඇත. තම ආරක්ෂාව සඳහා නිතරම තුවක්කුවක් අතැති කුමාර් මරා දැමීමට ටෙලෝ සංවිධානය තීරණය කළේය. කෙසේ වෙතත් කුමාර් භක්තිමත් හින්දු භක්තිකයෙකු බැවින් සිකුරාදා දිනවල තුවක්කුවක් රැගෙන නොගිය බව දන්නා කරුණකි. ඔහු සිකුරාදා දිනක තම මුනුපුරා වෙනුවෙන් පොළේ කෙසෙල් මිලදී ගනිමින් සිටියදී ටෙලෝ සංවිධානයේ ජෙගන් ඔහුට වැසී ගියේය. කුමාරගේ අත ඔහුගේ සාක්කුව තුළට ගියේ නැති තුවක්කුවකට අත දිගු කළේය. ජෙගන් ඔහුට වෙඩි තබද්දී කුමාරගේ අත ලේන්සුවක් සමඟින් පිට විය.

1977 සහ 1983 දෙමළ විරෝධී ප්‍රචණ්ඩ ක්‍රියා දෙකේදීම සුබතිරන්ගේ පවුල පීඩාවට පත් විය. 1977 අගෝස්තු මාසයේදී කළුතර ඔහුගේ නිවසට මැර ප්‍රහාරයක් එල්ල වන විට තම්බිරාජා වෙනත් ස්ථානයක රාජකාරි කරමින් සිටියේය. රත්නම්මා මුස්ලිම් අසල්වැසි නිවසක සැඟවී පලා ගියේය. ඔවුන්ගේ සියලු බඩු බාහිරාදිය ගිනිබත් විය. රත්නම්මා යාපනයේ පදිංචියට ගිය නමුත් තම්බිරාජා දිගටම දකුණේ සේවය කළේය. 1983 ජුලි මාසයේදී කිරුළපනේදී ඔහුට මැර පිරිසක් විසින් පහර දෙන ලදී. රෝහලෙන් පිටව ගිය පසු පිළිකුල් සහගත පොලිස් නිලධාරියා හමුදාවෙන් විශ්‍රාම ගෙන යාපනයේ නිවසට ගියේය.

ඔවුන්ගේ කරදර අවසන් වූයේ නැත. දෙමල ඊලම් ජනතා විමුක්ති සංවිධානය (PLOTE) දෑවැද්ද ලෙස ලබාදී උඩුපිඩ්ඩි ප්‍රදේශයේ ඔවුන්ගේ නිවස පවරා ගත්තේය. එබැවින් ඔවුහු තම්බිරාජාගේ නුනාවිල්හි නිවසට ගියහ. කොටි සංවිධානය පසුව උඩුපිඩ්ඩි නිවස අත්පත් කරගෙන එය කොටි කඳවුරක් බවට පත් කළේය. 1987 වඩමාරච්චි මෙහෙයුමේදී ඩෙන්සිල් කොබ්බෑකඩුවගේ නායකත්වයෙන් යුත් උඩුපිඩ්ඩි නිවස කොටි කඳවුරක්ව විනාශ විය.

සුභතිරන් ශිෂ්‍යයෙකු ලෙස සටන්කාමී ප්‍රවණතා අත්කර ගත්තේ මේ තත්ත්වයන් මධ්‍යයේ ය. ඔහු EPRLF හි න්‍යෂ්ටිය පිහිටුවීමට ගිය ඊළාම් ශිෂ්‍යයන්ගේ මහා සංගමයට (GUES) සම්බන්ධ විය. ආකර්ශනීය පෞරුෂයක් තිබූ ඔහු තරුණ තරුණියන් විශාල ප්‍රමාණයක් ව්‍යාපාරයට බඳවා ගැනීමට සමත් විය. ඊපීආර්එල්එෆ් මනා සැලසුම් සහගත දේශපාලන වැඩපිළිවෙලක් ක්‍රියාත්මක කළද, 1983 ප්‍රචණ්ඩත්වය සහ එහි ප්‍රතිඵලයක් ලෙස ඉන්දියානු මැදිහත්වීම එම ව්‍යාපාරයට හමුදාකරණ ක්‍රියාවලියකට අවතීර්ණ වීමට බල කළේය.

සුබතිරන් රොබට් යන නාමය ලබා ගත් අතර තමිල්නාඩුවේ කුඹකෝනම් හි ඊපීආර්එල්එෆ් කඳවුරේ හමුදා පුහුණුව ලැබීය. ඔහු උත්තර් ප්‍රදේශ්හි සෘජු ඉන්දීය පුහුණුවක් ලබා ගත්තේ නැත. රොබට් එච් ඉක්මනින්ම යාපනයේ ඊපීආර්එල්එෆ් අණදෙන නිලධාරියා බවට පත් වූ අතර ඩග්ලස් දේවානන්ද ඊපීආර්එල්එෆ්හි හමුදා අංශය වන මහජන විමුක්ති හමුදාවේ සමස්ත ප්‍රධානියා විය.

ඊ.පී.ආර්.එල්.එෆ් සංවිධානය විසින් යාපනය තැපැල් කන්තෝරුවේ රුපියල් කෝටි 100 ක පමණ සාර්ථක කොල්ලකෑමට වගකිවයුත්තේ රොබට් සහ රමේෂ් ය. ලක්ෂ 11 යි. ඔහු චංකානයි බැංකු කොල්ලයටද සම්බන්ධ වූවෙකි. කිලිනොච්චිය පොලිස් ස්ථානයට එල්ල වූ ප්‍රහාරයට ද නායකත්වය දුන් රොබට් ඩග්ලස්ගේ මෙහෙයවීමෙන් සින්නවන් ප්‍රමුඛ කරෙයිනගර් නාවික හමුදා කඳවුරට එල්ල වූ ගබ්සා ප්‍රහාරයට ද සහභාගි විය.

1985 දී රොබට් කුමාර් නම් තවත් සේවකයෙකු සමඟ යතුරුපැදියකින් හමුදා කන්ටොන්මන්ට් අසල ගුරුනගර් හි බීච් පාර දිගේ ගමන් කරමින් සිටියදී සොල්දාදුවන් කුමාර් හඳුනා ගත්හ. රොබට් අල්ලා ගන්නා විට ඔවුන් කුමාර් වෙඩි තබා මරා දැමීය. කෙසේ වෙතත් ඔහුගේ වැදගත්කම වටහා නොගත් අතර සුබතිරන් ගුරුනගර්, පලාලි, අලිමංකඩ සහ බූසා යන ස්ථානවල වසර දෙකකට වැඩි කාලයක් රැඳවුම් භාරයේ ගත කළේය. ඉන්දු ලංකා ගිවිසුමෙන් පසු ඔහු සහ ඔහුගේ සමීපතම මිතුරෙකු වූ ශ්‍රීතරන් හෙවත් සුගු නිදහස් විය.

රොබට් ඉන්දියානු හමුදා (IPKF) සමයේදී EPRLF රේඛාව විශ්වාසවන්තව අනුගමනය කළ අතර එක් අවස්ථාවකදී පළාත් සභා මන්ත්‍රීවරයෙකු ලෙස නම් කරන ලදී. ඔහුගේ පියා තම්බිරාජා පළාත් සභාව යටතේ ආරක්ෂක අධීක්ෂක ලෙස සේවය කළේය. ඊ.පී.ආර්.එල්.එෆ් ප්‍රමුඛ පළාත් සභා මන්ත්‍රීවරුන් කිහිප දෙනෙකු මරා දැමීමේ කොටි කුමන්ත්‍රණය තම්බිරාජා විසින් ව්‍යර්ථ කරන ලදී. මෙය ඔහු කොටි විසින් සලකුණු කිරීමට හේතු විය. රොබට්ගේ පියා තම්බිරාජා 1989 නොවැම්බර් 11 වැනිදා එල්ටීටීඊය විසින් අල්ලා ගන්නා ලදී. ඔහු අල්ලාගත් අයට සහ වාහනයට දඟලමින් පයින් ගසන අයුරු ඇසින් දුටුවෝ දුටුවෝය.

එල්ටීටීඊය රොබට්ගේ මවට දන්වා සිටියේ ඇගේ සැමියාගෙන් ප්‍රශ්න කරන බවයි. 1990 මැයි මාසයේදී තම්බිරාජාගේ මව මිය ගියාය. චාරිත්‍රානුකූලව අවසන් කටයුතු සිදුකිරීමට හැකිවන පරිදි ඔහුව නිදහස් කරන ලෙස ඔහුගේ බිරිඳ කොටි සංවිධානයෙන් ඉල්ලා සිටියාය. එවිට කොටි ඇයට කීවේ ඇගේ සැමියා ආරක්ෂක භටයන්ගෙන් තුවක්කුවක් උදුරා ගෙන අත්අඩංගුවේ සිට පැන යාමට තැත් කළ බවත්, ගැටුමේදී මරා දැමූ බවත්ය. 1989 නොවැම්බර් 17 වැනිදා මද්දුවිල්හිදී ඔහුගේ දේහය ආදාහනය කළ බව කොටි ප්‍රකාශ කළහ.

මේ අතර IPKF ඉවත් වීමෙන් පසු රොබට් අනෙකුත් EPRLF සාමාජිකයන් සමඟ ශ්‍රී ලංකාවෙන් පලා ගියේය. ඔහු ඔඩිෂා (එවකට ඔරිස්සා) වෙත ගොස් එහි සරණාගත කඳවුරක් භාරව සිටියේය. ඔහුගේ මව රත්නම්මා තම ස්වාමිපුරුෂයා අහිමි වී තම පුතාගෙන් වෙන්වීම නිසා එල්.ටී.ටී.ඊ.යේ ප්‍රසිද්ධියේම විවේචනය කරන්නියක් බවට පත් විය. කොටි 1992 දී ඇයව බෝට්ටුවකින් බලහත්කාරයෙන් ඉන්දියාවට ගෙන ගොස් එහි දමා ගියහ. එය ‘ නෙරපා හැරීමේ ’ ආකාරයේ දඬුවමක් විය. ඇය මදුරාසියේදී තම පුතා සමඟ නැවත එක් වූ අතර පසුව ඇය නැවත කොළඹට පැමිණ එහි සිට කැනඩාවට ගොස් තම දියණිය සමඟ එකතු විය.

රොබට් 90 දශකයේ මැද භාගයේදී ශ්‍රී ලංකාවට පැමිණියේය. ත්‍රිවිධ හමුදාව යාපනය යළි අත්පත් කර ගැනීමෙන් පසු ඔහු නැවත යාපනයට පැමිණ දේශපාලන කටයුතු ආරම්භ කළේය. කුප්‍රකට “මන්දයියන් කූජු” වැනි ඇතැම් EPRLF කොටස්වල සාහසික ක්‍රියා එම ව්‍යාපාරය ජනතාවගෙන් ඈත් කර තිබුණි. පසුගිය කාලය පුරාවටම ප්‍රසිද්ධියේ සමාව ගත් රොබට් වැනි අයගේ නොපසුබට උත්සාහය නිසා යලිත් යාපනයේ ඊ.පී.ආර්.එල්.එෆ්. 1998 පළාත් පාලන මැතිවරණයෙන් පක්ෂයට සභා කිහිපයක ආසන හිමි විය. එය මුළු ඡන්ද ප්‍රමාණයෙන් 15%ක් ලබා ගත්තා. රොබට් යාපනය නාගරික මන්ත්‍රීවරයා ලෙස තේරී පත් විය.

වරතරාජ පෙරුමාල් ඉන්දියාවේ සිට ශ්‍රී ලංකාවට පැමිණීමෙන් පසු ඊපීආර්එල්එෆ් සංවිධානය දෙකඩ විය. රොබට් වරතන් පාර්ශවයට සම්බන්ධ වී එහි නියෝජ්‍ය නායකයා බවට පත් විය. පෙරුමාල් වැඩි කාලයක් ගත කළේ ඉන්දියාවේ බැවින් ඔහු එහි ප්‍රධානියා විය. රොබට් යාපනය මහනගර සභාවට ද ශක්තියක් වූ අතර කොටි තර්ජන හමුවේ TULF පරිපාලනයට සහාය විය.

අන්තරාය නොතකා, ඔහු කොළඹට පදිංචියට යාම ප්‍රතික්ෂේප කළ අතර ඊපීආර්එල්එෆ් කාඩර්වරුන් එක්රැස් කරමින් යාපනයේ රැඳී සිටියේය. සෑම තරාතිරමකම මධ්‍යස්ථ දේශපාලනඥයන් සමඟ සුහද සබඳතා පවත්වමින් රොබට් කැළඹිලි සහිත දේශපාලන ජලය මධ්‍යයේ ඊපීආර්එල්එෆ් නොනැසී පවත්වා ගැනීමට වෙහෙස මහන්සි වී වැඩ කළේය. ඔහු කිසිවිටෙකත් දෙමළ විමුක්තියේ මුල් ඉලක්කය නොසළකා හැරිය නමුත් ප්‍රජාතන්ත්‍රවාදය, බහුත්වවාදය සහ මානව හිමිකම් බලාත්මක කිරීම සමඟ කලාපීය ස්වයං පාලනයක් පිළිබඳ දැක්ම වෙත එය දැන් මධ්‍යස්ථ කළේය. අවි ආයුධවලට සහ ඊළාම් සිහිනයට ස්ථිරසාර සමුගැනීමක් කළද, රොබට්, දෙමළ ජනයාගේ අයිතීන් සඳහා වූ ප්‍රබල සටන්කාමියෙකු ලෙස - අවසානය දක්වාම දිගටම සිටියේය.
මෙම ලිපිය 2022 ජූනි 11 වැනි දින “ඩේලි මිරර්” පුවත්පතේ “D.B.S.Jeyaraj Column” හි ප්‍රකාශයට පත් කරන ලදී. එයට මෙතැනින් ප්‍රවේශ විය හැක:

ta.title: 19 வருடங்களுக்கு முன் சுபத்திரன் என்ற ராபர்ட் ஒரு புலி துப்பாக்கி சுடும் வீரனால் கொல்லப்பட்டதை மீண்டும் பார்வையிடுதல்
body_lines: தனித் தமிழ் நாடு என்ற இலக்கை அடைவதற்காக தமிழ் போராளிக் குழுக்கள் முன்னெடுத்த ஆயுதப் போராட்டம் பாரிய உயிர்ச் சேதத்தையும் இரத்தக்களரியையும் ஏற்படுத்தியது. கொல்லப்பட்டவர்களில் பலர் உள்நாட்டு மோதல்கள் மற்றும் சகோதர யுத்தத்தால் பாதிக்கப்பட்டவர்கள். கொல்லப்பட்ட பலரில் ராபர்ட் என்கிற சுபத்திரனும் ஒரு வண்ணமயமான வரலாற்றைக் கொண்ட ஒரு கவர்ச்சியான ஆளுமை. அவர் 19 ஆண்டுகளுக்கு முன்பு ஜூன் 2003 இல் போர் நிறுத்தம் நடந்து கொண்டிருந்தபோது கொல்லப்பட்டார். இந்த பத்தி இந்த வாரம் கொலையை மீண்டும் பார்வையிட விரும்புகிறது.

ரொபேர்ட் எனப்படும் தம்பிராஜா சுபத்திரன் 2003 ஆம் ஆண்டு ஜூன் மாதம் 14 ஆம் திகதி சனிக்கிழமை காலை 6. 15 மணியளவில் யாழ்ப்பாணத்தில் சுட்டுக் கொல்லப்பட்டார். ரொபேர்ட் என்று பொதுவாக அழைக்கப்படும் சுபத்திரன் கொல்லப்பட்ட போது, ​​வடக்கு கிழக்கு மாகாண சபையின் முன்னாள் முதலமைச்சர் அண்ணாமலை வரதராஜப்பெருமாள் தலைமையிலான ஈழ மக்கள் புரட்சிகர விடுதலை முன்னணியின் (ஈபிஆர்எல்எப்) பிரிவின் பிரதித் தலைவராக இருந்தார். மற்றவர் அல்லது ஈ.பி.ஆர்.எல்.எப் பிரதான பிரிவு சுரேஷ் என்ற கந்தையா பிரேமச்சந்திரனால் வழிநடத்தப்பட்டது.

அந்த நாட்களில் இரண்டு குழுக்களும் முறையே சுரேஷ் கோஷ்டி மற்றும் வரதன் கோஷ்டி என்று ஊடகங்களில் விவரிக்கப்பட்டன. பாதுகாப்புக் காரணங்களுக்காக பெருமாள் இந்தியாவில் வசிப்பதால், வரதன் கோஷ்டியின் உண்மையான தலைவர்கள் துணைத் தலைவர் சுபத்திரன் மற்றும் அப்போதைய பொதுச் செயலாளர் திருநாவுக்கரசு ஸ்ரீதரன் என்ற சுகு. அடிப்படை யதார்த்தத்தைப் பொறுத்தவரை, கட்சிக்கு வடக்கு-கிழக்கில் நாளுக்கு நாள் தலைமைத்துவத்தை வழங்கியவர் ரொபர்ட்.

பின்னர் ஈபிஆர்எல்எப் வரதன் அணியானது ஈபிஆர்எல்எப் இன் பிரதான இணை நிறுவனர்-தலைவர் கே.பத்மநாபாவின் பெயரால் நாபா பிரிவு என அறியப்பட்டது. ரஞ்சன் என்று அழைக்கப்படும் நபா, தமிழ்நாட்டின் சென்னை சூளைமேட்டில் 1990 ஆம் ஆண்டு ஜூன் மாதம் தமிழீழ விடுதலைப் புலிகளால் படுகொலை செய்யப்பட்டார். பின்னர் நாபா பிரிவு மெழுகுவர்த்தியை சின்னமாக கொண்டு அரசியல் கட்சியாக பதிவு செய்யப்பட்டது. அதற்கு பத்மநாபா ஈழப் புரட்சிகர விடுதலை முன்னணி என்று பெயரிடப்பட்டது. சில ஆண்டுகளுக்கு முன்பு மற்றொரு மாற்றத்தில் மெழுகுவர்த்தி சின்னத்தை தக்க வைத்துக் கொண்டு அக்கட்சிக்கு சமூக ஜனநாயகக் கட்சி என்று பெயர் சூட்டப்பட்டது.

2002 ஆம் ஆண்டு பெப்ரவரியில் நோர்வேயின் தரகு போர்நிறுத்தம் நடைமுறைக்கு வந்தது. போர் நிறுத்தம் அமுலில் இருந்த போதிலும், ஈபிஆர்எல்எப் வரதன் பிரிவு மற்றும் டக்ளஸ் தேவானந்தா தலைமையிலான ஈழ மக்கள் ஜனநாயகக் கட்சி (ஈபிடிபி) உறுப்பினர்களை இலக்கு வைத்து புலிகள் கொலைவெறியில் ஈடுபட்டு வந்தனர். சுரேஷ் பிரேமச்சந்திரன் தலைமையிலான ஈ.பி.ஆர்.எல்.எப் பிரிவு தமிழ் தேசியக் கூட்டமைப்பில் (டி.என்.ஏ) இணைந்ததன் மூலம் புலிகளுடன் தன்னை இணைத்துக் கொண்டது மற்றும் புலிகளால் குறிவைக்கப்படவில்லை.

ராபர்ட் இறப்பதற்கு முன், பிபிசி அறிக்கை, பிப்ரவரி 2002 முதல் மே 2003 வரையிலான 16 மாத போர்நிறுத்தத்தின் போது வடகிழக்கில் அரசியல் காரணங்களுக்காக குறைந்தது 36 பேர் கொல்லப்பட்டதாக நம்பப்படுகிறது. ஈ.பி.ஆர்.எல்.எப்-ன் வடக்கு-கிழக்கு தளபதி ஆச்சரியப்படுவதற்கில்லை.

ரொபேர்ட் இறக்கும் போது யாழ்ப்பாணம் வைத்தியசாலை வீதியிலுள்ள EPRLF கட்சி அலுவலக வளாகத்தில் தங்கியிருந்தார். இரண்டு மாடிக் கட்டிடம் வேம்படி மகளிர் உயர்தரப் பாடசாலைக்கு அருகாமையில் இருந்தது. ராபர்ட் தினமும் காலையில் பால்கனியில் உடற்பயிற்சி செய்வது தினசரி வாடிக்கையாக இருந்தது. அந்த அதிர்ஷ்டமான நாளில் அவர் வழக்கம் போல் உடற்பயிற்சி செய்து கொண்டிருந்தார், அவருடைய தோழர்கள் இருவர் பார்த்துக் கொண்டிருந்தனர். திடீரென்று மூன்று அல்லது நான்கு "பிளாப்கள்" அடுத்தடுத்து இருந்தன. ரத்த வெள்ளத்தில் சுபத்திரன் சரிந்தான். அவர் அருகில் இருந்த யாழ் போதனா வைத்தியசாலைக்கு கொண்டு செல்லப்பட்டார். அருகாமையில் இருந்தபோதிலும், சேர்க்கைக்கு முன்பே ராபர்ட் இறந்துவிட்டார். அவரது தோள் மற்றும் மார்பில் துளைத்த தோட்டாக்கள் அவரது நுரையீரல், தமனிகள் மற்றும் விலா எலும்புகளைத் தாக்கியதாக பிரேதப் பரிசோதனையில் தெரியவந்தது.

வேம்படி பள்ளியின் தெற்கு பகுதியில் உள்ள மூன்று மாடி கட்டிடத்தில் உள்ள அறையில் இருந்து துப்பாக்கிச்சூடு நடத்தப்பட்டுள்ளது. மறைமுகமாக சைலன்சருடன் பொருத்தப்பட்ட ‘ஸ்னைப்பர்’ வகையைச் சேர்ந்த துப்பாக்கி பயன்படுத்தப்பட்டது. கொலையாளி அல்லது கொலையாளிகள் தோராயமாக 200 மீட்டர் தூரத்தில் இருந்து தென்கிழக்கு திசையில் சுட்டுள்ளனர். வகுப்பறை பயன்பாட்டில் இல்லாததால் பூட்டியே வைக்கப்பட்டு இருந்தது. ‘ஸ்னிப்பிங்’ செய்வதற்கு வசதியாக ஜன்னலை மறைக்கும் கம்பியில் ஒரு சதுரத் துளை போடப்பட்டிருந்தது கண்டுபிடிக்கப்பட்டது. ஜன்னலுக்கு ஒரு மேசை இழுக்கப்பட்டு, துப்பாக்கியை வைக்க உதவும் வகையில் இரண்டு சிறிய மணல் மூட்டைகள் அதில் பொருத்தப்பட்டன. மணல் நிறம் வேம்படி பள்ளி மைதானத்தில் இருந்து வந்ததைக் குறிக்கிறது.

காலையில் ராபர்ட்டை குறிவைக்க கொலையாளிகள் இரவு முழுவதும் விழிப்புடன் இருந்ததற்கான கதை அறிகுறிகள் இருந்தன. ஒரு காலியான கோகோ கோலா பாட்டில், பாதி வெற்று தண்ணீர் பாட்டில், ஒரு பாதி வெற்று கலவை பாக்கெட், கிட்டத்தட்ட காலியான லெமன் பஃப் பிஸ்கட் பாக்கெட் மற்றும் சில சாக்லேட் லேபிள்கள் பின்னால் விடப்பட்டன. கொலையாளிகள் முந்தைய மாலை அல்லது இரவிலிருந்தே அறையில் பதுங்கி இருந்ததாக இவை தெரிவிக்கின்றன.

இரண்டு பேர் பால்கனியில் இருந்தபோதிலும் ராபர்ட்டை மட்டும் அவர்கள் வெளியே எடுத்ததால், கொலையாளிகள் திறமையான துப்பாக்கி சுடும் வீரர்கள் என்பது தெளிவாகத் தெரிந்தது. துப்பாக்கி வெளிப்படையாக சக்திவாய்ந்ததாகவும் அதிநவீனமாகவும் இருந்தது மற்றும் துப்பாக்கி சுடுவதற்கு தேவையான தொலைநோக்கி காட்சிகளைக் கொண்டிருந்தது. 200 மீட்டர் தொலைவில் ஒரு குறிப்பிட்ட கோணத்தில் துல்லியமாக குறிவைத்து சுடுவது அமெச்சூர்களின் கைவேலையாக இருக்காது.

பள்ளியின் இரண்டு வாட்ச்மேன்களின் சாட்சியம் சுவாரஸ்யமானது. அவர்கள் கூறியபடி, காலையில் இரண்டு நபர்கள் இறங்கி வந்து கொலைக்கு பயன்படுத்தப்பட்ட பூட்டிய அறையின் “சாவி”யை அவர்களிடம் கொடுக்கும் வரை அவர்களுக்கு எதுவும் தெரியாது. அவர்கள் ஒரு பெரிய பையை ஏந்தியிருந்தனர் மற்றும் அவர்களின் நபரிடம் காணக்கூடிய துப்பாக்கிகள் எதுவும் இல்லை. ஒருவர் கால்சட்டை அணிந்த ஆண், மற்றவர் பள்ளி சீருடையில் இருந்த பெண். இந்தக் கூற்றுகள் சரியாக இருந்தால், துப்பாக்கியை கழற்றி பெரிய பையில் போட்டிருக்க வேண்டும். ஆனால் பூட்டிய வகுப்பறையின் சாவி எப்படி கிடைத்தது? என்ற கேள்வி இருந்தது.

காவலர்கள் கொலைக்கு உடந்தையாக இருந்திருக்கலாம் அல்லது குறைந்தபட்சம் அறிந்திருப்பார்கள் என்று போலீசார் சந்தேகிக்கின்றனர். நேற்று முன்தினம் மாலை நல்லூர் பிரதேச புலி அரசியல் ஆணையாளர் ஈஸ்வரன் வேம்படி பாடசாலையில் காணப்பட்டதாக ஈ.பி.ஆர்.எல்.எப். அன்று மாலை ஈ.பி.ஆர்.எல்.எப் ஆட்கள் கண்காணிப்பாளர்களிடம் வினவியபோது அவர்கள் அதை திட்டவட்டமாக மறுத்துள்ளனர். கண்காணிப்பாளர்களான மாணிக்கம் இளங்குமரன் மற்றும் முத்துக்குமாரு சந்திரநாதன் ஆகியோரை பொலிஸார் கைது செய்து விசாரணைக்காக மறு அறிவித்தல் வரை விளக்கமறியலில் வைக்கப்பட்டுள்ளனர். பின்னர் ஜாமீனில் விடுவிக்கப்பட்டனர்.

சுபத்திரன் கொல்லப்பட்ட சிறிது நேரத்திலேயே, ஈ.பி.ஆர்.எல்.எப் தலைவர் “இந்திய தொடர்பு” காரணமாக கொல்லப்பட்டார் என்ற வதந்தி யாழ்ப்பாணத்தில் பரவ ஆரம்பித்தது. இந்திய அதிகாரிகள் சிலரை ஏற்றிச் சென்ற உலங்குவானூர்தி யாழ்ப்பாணம் மத்திய கல்லூரி மைதானத்தில் அண்மையில் தரையிறங்கியதாக தமிழ் ஊடகங்களில் செய்திகள் வெளியாகியிருந்தன. சம்பந்தப்பட்ட அதிகாரிகள் இந்திய உளவு நிறுவனமான RAW (ஆராய்ச்சி மற்றும் பகுப்பாய்வு பிரிவு) செயல்பாட்டாளர்கள் என்று ஊகங்கள் பரவின. அந்த அதிகாரிகள் சுபத்திரனுடன் 45 நிமிட சந்திப்பு நடத்தியதாக யாழ் திராட்சை முனக ஆரம்பித்தது. இதனால் கோபமடைந்த புலிகள், முன்கூட்டிய முயற்சியில் சுபத்திரனைக் கொன்றனர்.

இந்திய உளவுத்துறையினர் உண்மையில் சுபத்திரனுடன் தொடர்பில் இருந்திருந்தால், அவர்கள் அவ்வாறு வெளிப்படையாகவும் வெட்கமாகவும் செய்திருக்க வாய்ப்பில்லை. க்ளோக் மற்றும் குத்துச்சண்டை செயல்பாடு அவ்வளவு தெளிவாக செய்யப்படவில்லை. புலிகள் சர்வ சாதாரணமாக யாழ்ப்பாணத்தில் இப்படி ஒரு கூட்டத்தை நடத்த முட்டாள்கள் மட்டுமே துணிந்திருப்பார்கள். RAW ஐயோ அல்லது சுபத்திரனையோ முட்டாள்கள் என்று அழைக்க முடியாது. அதுமட்டுமின்றி, நேருக்கு நேர் சந்திப்பது அவசியமானால், ரொபர்ட் புத்திசாலித்தனமாக கொழும்புக்கு விஜயம் செய்திருக்க முடியும்.

எவ்வாறாயினும் நம்பமுடியாது, இந்த சந்தேகம் ரொபர்ட்டை இலக்கு வைப்பதற்கு புலிகளுக்கு உடனடி காரணமாக இருந்திருக்கலாம். ரொபேர்ட் ஈ.பி.ஆர்.எல்.எப்.க்கு முக்கியத் தூணாக இருந்ததால், புலிகள் நிச்சயமாக அவரை வழிமறித்திருப்பார்கள். முக்கிய பிரமுகர்களை ஒழிப்பதே ஒரு அமைப்பைச் சிதைப்பதற்கான எளிதான வழி என்பதை புலிகள் அறிந்திருந்தனர். இருப்பினும், படுகொலை முறை அவசர முன்னுரிமையின் உணர்வை பரிந்துரைத்தது மற்றும் அந்த வழக்கில் ராபர்ட்டின் கொலை இந்த காரணத்தால் விரைவுபடுத்தப்பட்டிருக்கலாம்.

புலிகள் மீது குற்றவுணர்ச்சி விரல் நீட்டப்பட்ட போதிலும், புலிகள் வழக்கமான பாணியில் ரொபர்ட் படுகொலையையோ அல்லது ஏனைய கொலைகளையோ மறுக்கவோ அல்லது கண்டிக்கவோ இல்லை. போர்நிறுத்தத்தின் போது தமிழ் பகுதிகளில் அரசியல் கொலைகள் நடந்துகொண்டிருப்பதால், ராபர்ட் கொலை உட்பட அனைத்து கொலைகளுக்கும் புலிகளே காரணம் என்று நம்புவதற்கு வலுவான காரணங்கள் இருந்தன. எவ்வாறாயினும், புலிகள் அனைத்து கொலைகளையும் சட்டம் ஒழுங்கு பிரச்சனைகளாக சித்தரித்தனர், இதற்கு காவல்துறை பொறுப்பேற்க வேண்டும். இந்தச் சம்பவங்கள் அரசாங்கக் கட்டுப்பாட்டுப் பிரதேசங்களில் இடம்பெற்றதால், பொறுப்பு அரசின் மீது சுமத்தப்பட்டது என விடுதலைப் புலிகள் வாதிட்டனர். நோர்வேயின் அனுசரணையாளர்கள் மற்றும் கண்காணிப்பாளர்கள் இந்த விடயத்தை வெளிப்படுத்தியபோது, ​​அப்போதைய விடுதலைப் புலிகளின் அரசியல் பிரிவுத் தலைவர் எஸ்.பி. தமிழ்செல்வன் நேரடியான பதிலைத் தவிர்த்துவிட்டார்.

வடக்கு கிழக்கில் அப்போது நிலவிய மௌன சுவரில் இருந்தும், எதற்கு யார் பொறுப்பு என்பதை தமிழ் மக்கள் நன்கு உணர்ந்திருந்தனர். போர்நிறுத்தத்தின் அடிப்படையில் அரசியல் வேலைகளைச் செய்வதற்காக அரசாங்கக் கட்டுப்பாட்டுப் பகுதிகளுக்குள் புலிகள் தடையின்றி நுழைய அனுமதிக்கப்பட்ட பின்னரே இவ்வாறான கொலைகள் ஆரம்பித்தன என்பதை அவர்கள் நன்கு அறிந்திருந்தனர். இதற்கு முன் போர் நிறுத்தம் விதித்தபடி தமிழ் போராளிக் குழுக்களிடம் ஆயுதங்கள் கையளிக்கப்பட்டன. கொல்லப்பட்ட அரசியல் செயற்பாட்டாளர்களில் பெரும்பாலோர் புலிகளுக்கு எதிரான அரசியல் அமைப்புகளுடன் தொடர்புடையவர்கள் என்பதாலும், இந்த தமிழ் அரசியல் போட்டியாளர்கள் தமிழ் பிரதேசங்களை விட்டு வெளியேற வேண்டும் என்று புலிகள் விரும்பியதாலும், என்ன நடக்கிறது என்பதை உணர்ந்துகொள்ள அதிக புலனாய்வு தேவையில்லை.

மறுப்புகள் இருந்தபோதிலும், புலிகள் பெரும்பாலும் கடுமையான ஆணவத்தின் மூலம் விளையாட்டைக் கொடுத்தனர். விடுதலைப் புலிகள் பொறுப்பை ஏற்காத ஒரு சூழ்ச்சியாகக் கூட அப்படிப்பட்டவர்கள் கொல்லப்பட்ட போது அனுதாபமோ அல்லது இரங்கலோ அறிக்கையை வெளியிடவில்லை. இவ்வாறான கொலைகள் இடம்பெற்ற போது புலிகள் காது கேளாத மௌனம் காத்தது புலிகள் மீதான மறைமுக குற்றச்சாட்டாகும்.

யுத்த நிறுத்தத்தின் போது வடக்கு கிழக்கில் தமிழ் அரசியல் அதிருப்தியாளர்களின் காணாமற்போதல் மற்றும் கொலைகள் நடந்து கொண்டிருந்த போதிலும், இந்த நிகழ்வுக்கு உத்தியோகபூர்வ வட்டாரங்கள் மற்றும் மனித உரிமைகள் மற்றும் சமாதான ஆர்வலர்களின் பரப்புரையில் இருந்து மிகக் குறைவான பதில்களே இருந்தன. விடுதலைப் புலிகளை எந்த வகையிலும் ‘அப்செட்’ செய்ய வேண்டும் என்ற தயக்கம் இதற்குக் காரணமாக இருக்கலாம். புலிகளைக் கண்டிப்பது ‘சமாதான முன்னெடுப்புகள்’ என்று அழைக்கப்படுவதை சீர்குலைக்க வழிவகுக்கும் என்று உணரப்பட்டது.

எவ்வாறாயினும், சுபத்திரன் கொல்லப்பட்டது இந்த மனநிறைவைத் தகர்த்தது. சுபத்திரன் கொல்லப்பட்டபோது ஈபிஆர்எல்எப் (வி) அமைப்பின் டீ-ஜூர் எண். 2 மற்றும் டி-ஃபாக்டோ நம்பர் 1. அவர் தனது சொந்த உரிமையில் ஒரு அரசியல் தலைவராக இருந்தார். இதனால், அரசியல் ஸ்தாபனங்களும் ஊடக அமைப்புகளும் இந்தக் கொலையை கவனிக்க வேண்டிய நிலைக்குத் தள்ளப்பட்டன.

சுபத்திரனின் பூதவுடல் பொரளையில் உள்ள ஜயரத்ன இறுதிச்சடங்கு மண்டபத்தில் வைக்கப்பட்டுள்ளதையடுத்து பெருந்திரளான மக்கள் அஞ்சலி செலுத்தினர். இறுதி ஊர்வலத்தில் ஏராளமான அரசியல்வாதிகள், ஊடகவியலாளர்கள் கலந்து கொண்டனர். அப்போதைய இந்திய துணை உயர் ஸ்தானிகரும் கலந்து கொண்டார். சுபத்திரனின் தாயும் சகோதரியும் இறுதிச் சடங்கிற்காக கனடாவில் இருந்து இலங்கைக்கு வந்தனர். தகனம் ஜூன் 19 வியாழன் அன்று பொரளை கானத்தே மயானத்தில் இந்து பிரிவில் நடைபெற்றது.

முன்னதாக, யாழ்ப்பாணம் மருத்துவமனை சாலையில் உள்ள ஈழ மக்கள் புரட்சிகர விடுதலை முன்னணி (ஈபிஆர்எல்எஃப்) அலுவலகத்தில் அவரது உடல் அஞ்சலிக்காக வைக்கப்பட்டுள்ளது. ஈ.பி.ஆர்.எல்.எப் அலுவலகம் மற்றும் ஸ்டான்லி வீதியில் உள்ள ஈ.பி.டி.பி அலுவலகம் ஆகியவை ஒலிபெருக்கிகளில் துக்க இசையை ஒலித்தன. இந்த கொலைக்கு இரங்கல் மற்றும் கண்டனம் தெரிவித்து பல்வேறு அறிக்கைகள் வெளியிடப்பட்டன.

ரொபேர்ட் என்றழைக்கப்படும் தம்பிராஜா சுபத்திரன் 1957 ஆம் ஆண்டு டிசம்பர் மாதம் 24 ஆம் திகதி பிறந்தார். யாழ்ப்பாணம் மத்திய மற்றும் மானிப்பாய் இந்துக் கல்லூரிகளில் கல்வி கற்றார். இவரது தந்தை தம்பாப்பிள்ளை தம்பிராஜா சாவகச்சேரி நுணாவில் கிழக்கைச் சேர்ந்த ஓய்வுபெற்ற பொலிஸ் உப பொலிஸ் பரிசோதகர் ஆவார். உடுப்பிட்டியில் பிறந்த இவரது தாயார் ரத்னம்மா, முன்னாள் ஏஎஸ்பி குட்டிப்பிள்ளை குமாரின் சகோதரி ஆவார்.

சுபத்திரனின் தாய்வழி மாமா, ஏஎஸ்பி குமார், தமிழ் ஆயுதப் போர்க்குணத்தால் பாதிக்கப்பட்டவர்களில் ஒருவர். ஓய்வுபெற்ற காவல்துறை அதிகாரி, பழம்பெரும் தங்கத்துரை என்ற தங்கதுரை தலைமையிலான தமிழ் ஈழ விடுதலை அமைப்பின் (TELO) பாதையைக் கடந்தார். தனது பாதுகாப்பிற்காக எப்போதும் துப்பாக்கி ஏந்திய குமாரைக் கொல்ல TELO உறுதியாக இருந்தது. குமார் ஒரு பக்தியுள்ள இந்து என்பதால் வெள்ளிக்கிழமைகளில் துப்பாக்கி ஏந்தியதில்லை என்பது தெரிந்ததே. அவர் ஒரு வெள்ளிக்கிழமையன்று தனது பேர மகளுக்கு சந்தையில் வாழைப்பழங்களை வாங்கிக் கொண்டிருந்தபோது டெலோவின் ஜெகன் அவரை மூடினார். குமாரின் கை அவனது சட்டைப்பைக்குள் சென்று அங்கு இல்லாத துப்பாக்கியை நீட்டின. குமாரின் கை ஒரு கைக்குட்டையுடன் வெளியே வந்தது, அது ஜெகன் அவனை சுட்டு வீழ்த்தியது.

சுபத்திரனின் குடும்பம் 1977 மற்றும் 1983 தமிழர் விரோத வன்முறை இரண்டிலும் பாதிக்கப்பட்டது. 1977 ஆம் ஆண்டு ஆகஸ்ட் மாதம் களுத்துறையில் உள்ள அவரது வீடு கும்பலால் தாக்கப்பட்ட போது தம்பிராஜா வேறு இடத்தில் கடமையாற்றினார். ரத்னம்மா ஒரு முஸ்லீம் பக்கத்து வீட்டில் ஒளிந்து கொண்டு தப்பினார். அவர்களது உடமைகள் அனைத்தும் எரிந்து நாசமானது. ரத்னம்மா யாழ்ப்பாணத்திற்கு இடம்பெயர்ந்தார், ஆனால் தம்பிராஜா தெற்கில் தொடர்ந்து பணியாற்றினார். ஜூலை 1983 இல், கிருலப்பனையில் சில சக சிங்களப் பொலிஸாருடன் இணைந்து அவர் கும்பலால் தாக்கப்பட்டார். மருத்துவமனையில் இருந்து வெளியேறிய பின்னர் வெறுப்படைந்த பொலிஸ்காரர் படையிலிருந்து ஓய்வு பெற்று யாழ்ப்பாணம் வீட்டிற்குச் சென்றார்.

அவர்களின் கஷ்டங்கள் தீரவில்லை. தமிழீழ மக்கள் விடுதலைக் கழகம் (புளொட்) உடுப்பிட்டியில் உள்ள அவர்களது வீட்டை வரதட்சணையாகக் கைப்பற்றியது. எனவே அவர்கள் நுணாவிலில் உள்ள தம்பிராஜாவின் வீட்டிற்குச் சென்றனர். பின்னர் உடுப்பிட்டி வீட்டை புலிகள் கைப்பற்றி புலிகள் முகாமாக மாற்றினர். 1987 ஆம் ஆண்டு வடமராட்சியில் டென்சில் கொப்பேகடுவ தலைமையில் இடம்பெற்ற நடவடிக்கையின் போது புலிகளின் தளமாக இருந்த உடுப்பிட்டி வீடு அழிக்கப்பட்டது.

இந்தச் சூழ்நிலைகளுக்கு மத்தியில்தான் சுபத்திரன் மாணவனாக இருந்தபோதே போராளிப் போக்குகளைப் பெற்றார். அவர் ஈழ மாணவர்களின் பொதுச் சங்கத்தில் (GUES) சேர்ந்தார், அது EPRLF இன் கருவை உருவாக்கியது. அவர் ஒரு கவர்ச்சியான ஆளுமை மற்றும் இயக்கத்தில் அதிக எண்ணிக்கையிலான இளைஞர்களை சேர்க்க முடிந்தது. ஈ.பி.ஆர்.எல்.எப் நன்கு திட்டமிடப்பட்ட அரசியல் வேலைத்திட்டத்தை நடத்தி வந்த போதிலும், 1983 வன்முறை மற்றும் அதன் விளைவாக இந்திய ஈடுபாடு அந்த இயக்கத்தை ஒரு இராணுவமயமாக்கல் செயல்முறையில் இறங்க நிர்ப்பந்தித்தது.

சுபத்திரன் ராபர்ட் என்ற பெயரைப் பெற்று, தமிழ்நாட்டின் கும்பகோணத்தில் உள்ள ஈபிஆர்எல்எஃப் முகாமில் இராணுவப் பயிற்சி பெற்றார். அவர் உத்தரபிரதேசத்தில் நேரடியாக இந்திய பயிற்சி பெறவில்லை. டக்ளஸ் தேவானந்தா ஈபிஆர்எல்எப்பின் இராணுவப் பிரிவான மக்கள் விடுதலைப் படையின் ஒட்டுமொத்தத் தலைவராக இருந்தபோது, ​​ரொபர்ட் எச் விரைவில் யாழ்ப்பாணத்திற்கான ஈபிஆர்எல்எஃப் தளபதியாக ஆனார்.

ரொபேர்ட் மற்றும் ரமேஷ் ஆகியோர் ஈ.பி.ஆர்.எல்.எப் யாழ்ப்பாண தபால் அலுவலகத்தில் சுமார் ரூ. 11 லட்சம். இவர் சங்கானை வங்கிக் கொள்ளையிலும் ஈடுபட்டுள்ளார். கிளிநொச்சி பொலிஸ் நிலையத்தின் மீதான தாக்குதலுக்கு ரொபேர்ட் தலைமை தாங்கியதுடன், டக்ளஸ் தலைமையில் சின்னவன் தலைமையில் காரைநகர் கடற்படை முகாம் மீதான கருக்கலைப்புத் தாக்குதலில் பங்குபற்றினார்.

1985 ஆம் ஆண்டு ராபர்ட் குமார் என்ற மற்றொரு கேடருடன் மோட்டார் சைக்கிளில் குருநகரில் உள்ள பீச் ரோடு வழியாக ராணுவக் கண்டோன்மென்ட் வழியாகச் சென்று கொண்டிருந்தபோது, ​​ராணுவ வீரர்கள் குமாரை அடையாளம் கண்டுகொண்டனர். ராபர்ட் பிடிபட்ட போது அவர்கள் துப்பாக்கியால் சுட்டு குமாரைக் கொன்றனர். எவ்வாறாயினும் அவரது முக்கியத்துவம் உணரப்படவில்லை மற்றும் சுபத்திரன் குருநகர், பலாலி, ஆனையிறவு மற்றும் பூசா ஆகிய இடங்களில் இரண்டு வருடங்களுக்கும் மேலாக தடுப்புக்காவலில் இருந்தார். இந்திய-இலங்கை ஒப்பந்தத்தின் பின்னர் அவர் தனது நெருங்கிய நண்பரான ஸ்ரீதரன் என்ற சுகுவுடன் விடுவிக்கப்பட்டார்.

இந்திய இராணுவம் (IPKF) காலத்தில் EPRLF வழியை உண்மையாகப் பின்பற்றிய ரொபர்ட் ஒரு கட்டத்தில் மாகாண சபை உறுப்பினராக நியமிக்கப்பட்டார். இவரது தந்தை தம்பிராஜா மாகாண சபையின் கீழ் பாதுகாப்பு மேற்பார்வையாளராக பணியாற்றினார். ஈ.பி.ஆர்.எல்.எப் சில முக்கிய மாகாணசபை உறுப்பினர்களைக் கொல்ல புலிகளின் சதித் திட்டம் தம்பிராஜாவால் முறியடிக்கப்பட்டது. இதனால் அவர் புலிகளால் குறியிடப்பட்டார். ரொபேர்ட்டின் தந்தை தம்பிராஜா நவம்பர் 11, 1989 இல் விடுதலைப் புலிகளால் கைது செய்யப்பட்டார். அவரைக் கைப்பற்றியவர்களையும் வாகனத்தையும் அவர் போராடி உதைப்பதை நேரில் கண்டவர்கள் கண்டனர்.

ரொபேர்ட்டின் தாயாரின் கணவர் விசாரணைக்கு உட்படுத்தப்படுவதாக புலிகள் தெரிவித்தனர். 1990 மே மாதம் தம்பிராஜாவின் தாயார் இறந்தார். வழக்கப்படி இறுதிக் கிரியைகளை மேற்கொள்ள அவரை விடுவிக்குமாறு அவரது மனைவி விடுதலைப் புலிகளிடம் கெஞ்சினார். அப்போது புலிகள் அவரிடம், அவரது கணவர் காவலர்களிடம் இருந்து துப்பாக்கியைப் பறித்துக்கொண்டு காவலில் இருந்து தப்பிக்க முயன்றதாகவும், சண்டையில் கொல்லப்பட்டதாகவும் கூறினார். 1989 ஆம் ஆண்டு நவம்பர் மாதம் 17 ஆம் திகதி அவர் மட்டுவிலில் தகனம் செய்யப்பட்டதாக புலிகள் தெரிவித்தனர்.

இதற்கிடையில் IPKF பின்வாங்கியதையடுத்து ரொபர்ட் மற்ற EPRLF உறுப்பினர்களுடன் இலங்கையை விட்டு வெளியேறினார். அவர் ஒடிசாவுக்கு (அப்போது ஒரிசா) சென்று அங்குள்ள அகதிகள் முகாமின் பொறுப்பாளராக இருந்தார். அவரது தாயார் ரத்னம்மா தனது கணவரை இழந்து தனது மகனைப் பிரிந்து விடுதலைப் புலிகளை வெளிப்படையாக விமர்சித்தார். 1992 இல் புலிகள் அவளை ஒரு படகில் வலுக்கட்டாயமாக இந்தியாவிற்கு அழைத்துச் சென்று அங்கேயே விட்டுச் சென்றனர். அது ஒரு ‘வெளியேற்றம்’ தண்டனை வடிவமாகும். அவர் தனது மகனுடன் மதராஸில் மீண்டும் இணைந்தார், பின்னர் கொழும்பு திரும்பினார், அங்கிருந்து தனது மகளுடன் சேர்ந்து கனடா சென்றார்.

90களின் நடுப்பகுதியில் ரொபர்ட் இலங்கைக்குத் திரும்பினார். ஆயுதப் படைகள் யாழ்ப்பாணத்தைக் கைப்பற்றிய பின்னர், யாழ்ப்பாணம் திரும்பி அரசியல் பணிகளைத் தொடங்கினார். இழிவான “மண்டையன் குழு” போன்ற சில EPRLF பிரிவினரின் அட்டூழியங்கள் இயக்கத்தை மக்களிடமிருந்து அந்நியப்படுத்தியது. ரொபேர்ட் போன்றவர்களின் அயராத முயற்சியினால் தான் கடந்த கால வரம்புகளுக்கு பகிரங்கமாக மன்னிப்புக் கேட்டது, ஈ.பி.ஆர்.எல்.எப் மீண்டும் யாழ்ப்பாணத்தில் ஸ்தாபிக்க முடிந்தது. 1998 ஆம் ஆண்டு உள்ளூராட்சி மன்றத் தேர்தலில் கட்சி பல சபைகளில் இடங்களை வென்றது. மொத்த வாக்குகளில் 15% பெற்றது. ரொபர்ட் யாழ்ப்பாண மாநகர சபை உறுப்பினராக தெரிவு செய்யப்பட்டார்.

வரதராஜப் பெருமாள் இந்தியாவில் இருந்து இலங்கை திரும்பியதை அடுத்து ஈ.பி.ஆர்.எல்.எப். ராபர்ட் வரதன் கோஷ்டியில் சேர்ந்து அதன் துணைத் தலைவரானார். பெருமாள் தனது பெரும்பாலான நேரத்தை இந்தியாவில் கழித்ததால் அவர் கிட்டத்தட்ட அதன் தலைவராக இருந்தார். ரொபேர்ட் யாழ்ப்பாண மாநகர சபைக்கு பலம் வாய்ந்த கோபுரமாகவும் இருந்தார் மற்றும் புலிகளின் அச்சுறுத்தல்களுக்கு முகங்கொடுத்து TULF நிர்வாகத்திற்கு ஆதரவளித்தார்.

ஆபத்து இருந்தபோதிலும், அவர் கொழும்புக்கு இடம்பெயர மறுத்து, யாழ்ப்பாணத்தில் தங்கி, ஈ.பி.ஆர்.எல்.எப். அனைத்து சாயல்களிலும் மிதவாத அரசியல்வாதிகளுடன் நல்லுறவைப் பேணி, கொந்தளிப்பான அரசியல் நீர்நிலைகளுக்கு மத்தியில் ஈ.பி.ஆர்.எல்.எப்.ஐ நிலைநிறுத்துவதற்கு ரொபேர்ட் துணிச்சலாக பாடுபட்டார். தமிழர் விடுதலையின் அசல் இலக்கை அவர் ஒருபோதும் இழக்கவில்லை, ஆனால் ஜனநாயகம், பன்மைத்துவம் மற்றும் மனித உரிமைகள் அமலாக்கம் ஆகியவற்றுடன் பிராந்திய சுயாட்சிக்கான பார்வைக்கு இப்போது அதை மிதப்படுத்தினார். ஆயுதங்களுக்கும் ஈழக் கனவுக்கும் உறுதியான பிரியாவிடை அளித்த போதிலும், ரொபேர்ட், தமிழர்களின் உரிமைகளுக்காக ஒரு வலிமைமிக்கப் போராளியாக - இறுதிவரை தொடர்ந்து இருந்தார்.
இந்தக் கட்டுரை ஜூன் 11, 2022 அன்று “டெய்லி மிரர்” நாளிதழின் “டி.பி.எஸ்.ஜெயராஜ் நெடுவரிசையில்” வெளியிடப்பட்டது. இதை இங்கே அணுகலாம்:

en.title: Re-visiting the Killing of Subathiran Alias Robert by a Tiger Sniper 19 Years ago
body_lines: The  armed struggle launched by Tamil militant groups to achieve the objective of a separate Tamil state caused massive  loss of life and bloodshed. Many of those killed were victims of internecine conflict and fratricidal warfare. Among the many who were killed was Subathiran alias Robert,  a charismatic personality with a colourful history. He was killed  19 years ago in June 2003 while a ceasefire was  supposedly in progress. This column intends re-visiting the murder this week.

Thambirajah Subathiran alias Robert was shot dead on Saturday, June 14, 2003 at about 6. 15 a.m. in Jaffna. Subathiran generally known by his nom de guerre Robert was  at the time of his killing ,  the deputy leader of the Eelam People’s Revolutionary Liberation Front (EPRLF) faction led by Annamalai Varatharajapperumal, former chief minister of the North-Eastern Provincial Council.The  other or main  EPRLF faction  was (and is)  led by  Kandiah Premachandran alias Suresh.

In those days the two groupings were described in the media as Suresh Faction and Varathan Faction respectively. With Perumal living in India  for reasons of security the actual de-facto leaders of the Varathan faction  were  deputy leader  Subathiran and the then  General- Secretary Thirunaavukkarasu Sritharan alias Sugu. In terms of ground reality, it was Robert who provided day to day leadership in the north-east for the party.

Subsequently  the EPRLF   Varathan faction  became known as the Nabha faction after the main EPRLF’s Co-founder -leader K Padmanabha. Nabha also called Ranjan  was assassinated by the Liberation Tigers of Tamil Eelam(LTTE) in June 1990 at Choolaimedhu in Chennai,Tamil Nadu. Later the Nabha faction  was registered as a political party with the candle as its symbol. It was  named the Padmanabha Eelam  Revolutionary Liberation Front. In another change a few years ago the party was re-named Social Democratic Party of Tamils  while retaining the candle symbol.

The Norway brokered Ceasefire had come into effect in February 2002. Despite  the ceasefire being in force,  the LTTE   was indulging in a killing spree, targeting members of the EPRLF Varathan faction and the Eelam Peoples Democratic Party(EPDP) led by Douglas Devananda. The EPRLF  faction headed by Suresh Premachandran had aligned itself with the LTTE by joining the Tamil National Alliance(TNA) and was not targeted by the tigers.

Prior to Robert’s death,  a BBC report had  stated that at least 36 persons  were believed to have  been killed for political reasons in the north-east during 16 months of ceasefire from Feb 2002 to May 2003.. Against this backdrop the killing of Robert – the EPRLF’s north-east commander came as no surprise.

At the time of his death, Robert was staying in the EPRLF party office premises on Hospital Road in Jaffna.The two storeyed building was in the vicinity of Vembadi Girl’s High School. It was daily routine for Robert to exercise every morning on the balcony. He was exercising as usual on that fateful day while two of his comrades stood by watching. Suddenly there were three or four “plops” in succession. A bleeding Subathiran collapsed. He was rushed to the Jaffna Teaching Hospital nearby. Despite the close proximity Robert died before admission. A post-mortem revealed later that bullets piercing his shoulder and chest had hit his lungs, arteries and ribs.

The firing had come from a room in a three-storeyed building in the southern area of Vembadi School. A rifle of the ‘sniper’ variety, presumably fixed with a silencer had been used. The assassin or assassins had fired in a south-eastern direction from a distance of approximately 200 metres. The class room was not in use and was usually kept locked. It was found that a square aperture had been made in the wiremesh covering the window to facilitate ‘sniping.’ A table had been dragged to the window and two small sandbags were mounted on it to  perhaps help place the rifle. The colour of the sand indicated that it had come from Vembadi school grounds.

There were tell-tale signs  of the assassins keeping vigil overnight to target Robert in the morning. An empty Coca Cola bottle, half empty water bottle, a half empty mixture packet , a nearly empty Lemon Puff biscuit packet and some chocolate labels were left behind. These suggested that the assassins had been hiding in the room from the previous evening or night.

It was patently clear that the assassins were skilled marksmen as it was only Robert whom they had taken out despite two others being on the balcony. The gun was obviously powerful and sophisticated and would have had telescopic sights necessary for sniping. Taking aim and firing precisely from a particular angle at a distance of around 200 metres was certainly not the handiwork of amateurs.

The testimony of the school’s two watchmen was interesting . According to them they had not known anything till two persons came down in the  morning and gave them the “key” to the locked room used for the killing. They were carrying a large bag and had no visible firearms on their person. One was a male in trousers and the other a female in school uniform. If these assertions were correct then the gun must have been dismantled and put in the large bag. But how did they get the key to the locked classroom? was the question.

Police  suspected  complicity or at least knowledge of the killing by the watchers. On the previous  evening the EPRLF  had received a report that the Nallur area Tiger Political Commissar Eswaran was seen at Vembadi school. When the EPRLF men questioned the watchers that evening they had flatly denied it. The watchers Manickam Ilankumaran and Muttukumaru Chandranathan  were  taken into custody by the Police  and remanded until further notice for questioning.  Later they were  released on bail.

Shortly after  Subathiran was killed, a rumour began circulating in Jaffna that the EPRLF leader was killed  because of an “Indian connection.” It had been  reported in the Tamil  media that a helicopter carrying some Indian officials had landed at the Jaffna Central College grounds recently. Speculation was rife that the officials concerned were  Indian espionage agency RAW (research and analysis wing) operatives. The Jaffna grapevine  began humming that those officials had  had a 45 minute meeting with Subathiran. The Tigers apparently were upset by this and in a pre-emptive bid had killed Subathiran.

If Indian intelligence personnel had indeed been in touch with Subathiran , it was highly unlikely that they would have done  so  in such an  open and brazen manner.  Cloak and dagger activity is not done so visibly. Only morons would have dared to conduct such a meeting in Jaffna with a Tiger omnipresence. Neither RAW nor Subathiran could be called imbeciles. Besides if a face to face meeting was necessary, Robert could have discreetly visited Colombo.

However implausible, this suspicion  may  very well have been the immediate cause for the LTTE in targeting Robert. With Robert being the mainstay of the EPRLF, the LTTE would have certainly wanted him out of the way. The Tigers knew that the easiest way to wreck an organisation is to eliminate key figures. The mode of assassination however suggested a sense of urgent priority and in that case Robert’s murder may have been expedited due to this reason.

Though the  finger of guilt poined  to the LTTE , the tigers in typical fashion neither denied nor condemned the Robert  assassination or the other killings. Given the  on going  pattern of political killings in the Tamil areas  during the ceasefire, there were strong grounds to believe that the LTTE was responsible for all the killings including the  Robert  murder . The LTTE however depicted  all the killings as law and order problems for which the police should take responsibility. Since these incidents took place in government controlled areas the onus was on the state , argued the LTTE.  The then LTTE  Political Wing Chief S. P. Tamilselvan  evaded a direct answer when the Norwegian facilitators and monitors broached the subject..

In spite of the wall of silence that  prevailed  in the north-east then,  the Tamil people were well aware of who was responsible for what. They knew fully well that these types of killings began after Tiger cadres were allowed unfettered entry into government controlled areas to do political work in terms of the ceasefire. This was preceded by the handing over of arms in the possession of Tamil militant groups as stipulated by the ceasefire. Given the fact  that most of the political activists killed were connected to political organisations opposed to the Tigers and that the LTTE had wanted  these Tamil political rivals to leave the Tamil areas, it did  not require much intelligence to realise what was happening.

Despite the denials, the Tigers often gave the game away through  callous  arrogance. The LTTE never issued a statement expressing sympathy or condolences when such persons were killed even as a subterfuge to disclaim responsibility. The deafening silence maintained by the LTTE when such murders took  place was an indirect indictment of the Tigers.

Even though the disappearances and killings of Tamil political dissidents in the north-east were going on during the ceasefire, there was  very little response to the phenomenon from both official circles as well as the human rights cum peace activist lobby. This was presumably due to a reluctance to ‘upset’ the LTTE in any way. It was felt perhaps that reprimanding the Tigers could lead to a disruption of the so called ‘peace process.’

The killing of Subathiran however  shattered this complacency.Subathiran was  the de-jure No. 2 and de-facto No. 1 of the EPRLF (V) organisation when killed. He was a political leader in his own right. Thus, the political establishment and media organs  were  forced to take notice of the killing.

Large crowds paid their respects as Subathiran’s body  was laid  in the Jayaratne Funeral Parlour at Borella. Many politicians and journalists were present at the funeral. The  then Indian Deputy High Commissioner too was an attendee. Subathiran’s mother and sister flew down to Sri Lanka from Canada for the funeral. The cremation was on Thursday, June 19 at the Hindu section of Borella Kanatte cemetery.

Earlier his body lay in state at the Eelam People’s Revolutionary Liberation Front (EPRLF) office at Hospital Road in Jaffna. The EPRLF office as well as the EPDP office at Stanley Road blared mournful music over loudspeakers. Various statements expressing condolences and condemnation over the killing were issued.

Thambirajah Subathiran  alias Robert was  born on December 24, 1957. He was educated at Jaffna Central and Manipay Hindu Colleges. His father Thambapillai Thambirajah was a retired police sub-inspector hailing from Nunavil East in Chavakachcheri.  His mother  Ratnamma ,born in Udupiddy, was the sister of former ASP Kuttipillai Kumar.

Subathiran’s maternal uncle, ASP Kumar was one of the early victims of Tamil armed militancy.The retired police officer had crossed the path of the Tamil Eelam Liberation Organisation (TELO) led by the legendary Thangathurai alias Thanganna. The TELO was determined to kill Kumar who always carried a gun for his protection. It was known however that Kumar being a devout Hindu did not carry a gun on Fridays. He was buying plantains at the market for his grand daughter on a Friday when Jegan of the TELO closed in on him. Kumar’s hand went instinctively into his pocket reaching for a gun that was not there. Kumar’s hand came out with a handkerchief that fluttered briefly as Jegan gunned him down.

Subathiran’s family was affected in both the 1977 and 1983  anti-Tamil violence. In  August 1977 Thambirajah was on duty elsewhere when his house in Kalutara was attacked by mobs. Ratnammah escaped by hiding in a Muslim neighbour’s house. All their belongings were burnt. Ratnamma relocated to Jaffna but Thambirajah continued to serve in the south. In  July 1983 he was assaulted by mobs in Kirulapone with some fellow Sinhala policemen collaborating. After discharge from hospital the disgusted policeman retired from the force and went home to Jaffna.

Their troubles did not end. The  Peoples Liberation Organization of Tamil Eelam(PLOTE) took over their house in Udupiddy given as dowry. So they moved to Thambirajah’s house in Nunavil. The LTTE later took over the Udupiddy house and made it a  tiger camp. In 1987 during the Vadamarachchy operation led by Denzil Kobbekaduwa the Udupiddy house – being an LTTE base was destroyed.

It was amid these circumstances that Subathiran acquired militant tendencies as a student. He joined the General Union of Eelam Students (GUES) that went on to form the nucleus of the EPRLF. He had a charismatic personality and was able to recruit a large number of youngsters to the movement. Though the EPRLF was conducting a well planned political programme , the 1983 violence and consequent Indian involvement compelled that movement to embark upon a militarisation process.

Subathiran took the  nom de guerre  Robert and underwent military training at the EPRLF camp in Kumbakonam in Tamil Nadu. He did not receive direct Indian training in Uttar Pradesh. Robert h soon became the EPRLF commander for Jaffna while Douglas Devananda was overall chief of the People’s Liberation Army – the military wing of the EPRLF.

Robert and Ramesh were responsible for the EPRLF’s successful heist of the Jaffna post office amounting to around Rs. 11 lakhs. He was also involved in the Chankanai bank robbery. Robert also led the attack on the Kilinochchi police station and participated in the abortive attack on Karainagar naval base led by Sinnavan under the direction of Douglas.

In 1985 Robert was travelling on a motor cycle with another cadre named  Kumar, along Beach Road in Gurunagar by the army cantonment when soldiers recognised Kumar. They fired and killed Kumar while Robert was captured. His importance however was not realised and Subathiran spent more than two years in detention at Gurunagar, Palaly, Elephant Pass and Boosa. He, along with his close friend Sritharan alias Sugu were released after the Indo-Lanka Accord.

Robert followed the EPRLF line faithfully during the  Indian Army (IPKF) period and at one point was nominated as a provincial councillor. His father Thambirajah worked as security supervisor under the provincial council. An LTTE plot to kill some important EPRLF provincial councillors was foiled by Thambirajah. This led to him being marked by the Tigers. Robert’s father Thambirajah was seized by the LTTE on November 11, 1989. Eyewitnesses saw him struggling and kicking his captors and the vehicle.

The LTTE informed Robert’s mother that her husband was being interrogated. In May 1990 Thambirajah’s mother died. His wife entreated the LTTE to release him so that he could perform the last rites according to custom. The Tigers then told her that her husband had tried to escape from custody by wresting a gun from his guards and had been killed in the fracas. He was cremated on November 17, 1989 at Madduvil, the Tigers said.

Robert meanwhile fled Sri Lanka with other EPRLF cadres after the IPKF withdrew. He went to  Odisha (then Orissa ) and was  in charge  of a refugee camp there. His mother Ratnammah having lost her husband and being parted from her son became an openly defiant critic of the LTTE. The Tigers in 1992 took her by force on a boat to India and left her there. It was an ‘expulsion’ form of punishment. She was reunited with her son in Madras and later returned to Colombo from where she went to Canada to  join her daughter.

Robert returned in the mid ’90s to Sri Lanka. After the armed forces recaptured Jaffna, he returned to Jaffna and commenced political work. The atrocities of certain EPRLF sections  like the notorious “Mandaiyan Kuzhu”had alienated the movement from the people. It was due to the untiring efforts of  persons like Robert who apologised publicly for past excesses , that the EPRLF  was able to re-establish  itself in Jaffna again. The 1998 local authority polls saw the party win seats on several councils. It got 15% of the total vote. Robert was elected Jaffna municipal councillor.

The EPRLF split after the return of Varatharaja Perumal to Sri Lanka from India. Robert joined the Varathan faction and became its deputy leader. He was virtually its head as Perumal spent most of his time in India. Robert was also a tower of strength to the Jaffna municipal council and supported the TULF administration in the face of LTTE threats.

Despite  danger, he refused to  relocate  to Colombo and remained in Jaffna, rallying EPRLF cadres. Maintaining cordial relations with moderate politicians of all hues, Robert strove manfully to keep the EPRLF afloat amid turbulent political waters. He never lost sight of the original goal of Tamil emancipation but moderated it now to the vision of regional autonomy along with democracy, pluralism and enforcement of human rights. Though having bade a firm farewell to arms and the Eelam dream, Robert continued to remain what he was essentially – a mighty fighter for the rights of Tamils – until the very end.
